subject: For defending my home, I was charged with a felony
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s livesWhen the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f0f7fd7d4727474da150084c63ac5063&_e=u6qyLq5GTc6ZAnVFoTfNA106vZ4aZe6QcXjBp-i2F2-N5IAZgFX5wYqGLLnsU3c6y7uc5KaP0OiTbHUCm7atV0kBEkCW7wlWXlKxT4HzcCqBsbh4xX7ZEvt_eyzUjuqS7pe58WC-FYdYquW7BpoKHOLc73jhyHr3oG00QJB5Mly9Zyy4xXAiR3LK3GlGcvHM2C4d58R6MKJLIiMrByxBDPIC5_iQEfmWz78GmSqq7uIl9fmBZv6pZ93GcyVmaKRynwGux9RzyVujQ2A9Hjp_PXkYfp4Pu0Vnn0qE8jduw7sadFEBSZIYiTjNcgRHmVZ3f3a2OOwygHgDlYEhBqsJDLfolsm1R1qmDaIkLfKh7ifSPqG7HklQ29jY0rAGY1DFV18i9F2ZahxIIEMUxF9_vgGRlgHD1-1TS4_TUxQHrAiT5VBO-ahSH3n9MWOgWvaQOCPOY5sBUm75x6pstYKueg%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past.

When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath.

**My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground._And the scariest part of all?_ What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today.**

**That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate.**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f0f7fd7d4727474da150084c63ac5063&_e=u6qyLq5GTc6ZAnVFoTfNA106vZ4aZe6QcXjBp-i2F2-N5IAZgFX5wYqGLLnsU3c6y7uc5KaP0OiTbHUCm7atV0kBEkCW7wlWXlKxT4HzcCqBsbh4xX7ZEvt_eyzUjuqS7pe58WC-FYdYquW7BpoKHOLc73jhyHr3oG00QJB5Mly9Zyy4xXAiR3LK3GlGcvHM2C4d58R6MKJLIiMrByxBDPIC5_iQEfmWz78GmSqq7uIl9fmBZv6pZ93GcyVmaKRyH3_9rtPG3OAFuH24kDUydbAXUDjsP3NZ7j8kSY82th6e9mfkZ0HN72vKALDizoKCxzWZjiDZJcarNsb1-FSw2nROnxHeAqkXbvOABv6zFD_-ZOEOozspi_xoc2oNRCiDzEMCXvP32TmZSY5YEN07lDOheH5W0VNffESjKELip5l0EyU0PZOuviWW1OgtE9OyVIFFMCiVzTIukImwVmLpUg%3D%3D) [WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO »](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f0f7fd7d4727474da150084c63ac5063&_e=u6qyLq5GTc6ZAnVFoTfNA106vZ4aZe6QcXjBp-i2F2-N5IAZgFX5wYqGLLnsU3c6y7uc5KaP0OiTbHUCm7atV0kBEkCW7wlWXlKxT4HzcCqBsbh4xX7ZEvt_eyzUjuqS7pe58WC-FYdYquW7BpoKHOLc73jhyHr3oG00QJB5Mly9Zyy4xXAiR3LK3GlGcvHM2C4d58R6MKJLIiMrByxBDPIC5_iQEfmWz78GmSqq7uIl9fmBZv6pZ93GcyVmaKRyZLVTY4lTYIQlkiRQA1WbQFuxOKzgBLpWl1fsnSZXXbgq3uEmTrNe_YzMpEhN-p_fiGFm7PJqlB-NSrsJc9RG0Xkj69u7P8d-uqGw9bV3HdR4MfyU5egMs2OWPf4zPmuaEBts8OUxwvYLkXzzVgZvZ6kZwqkJP5DAeqJM-svx4-a4eCkrrf7USWsWBKfUtN8cf8CBA0OqUjzJlIyPdoiktw%3D%3D)
Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last year**we were charged with unlawful use of a weapon.**

**Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around.**

**I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms.**

I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us.

**I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life.**

**[Will you consider a contribution of $5, $10, $25, $100 or more today to help me ensure every conservative in America sees my Senate announcement video?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f0f7fd7d4727474da150084c63ac5063&_e=u6qyLq5GTc6ZAnVFoTfNA106vZ4aZe6QcXjBp-i2F2-N5IAZgFX5wYqGLLnsU3c6y7uc5KaP0OiTbHUCm7atV0kBEkCW7wlWXlKxT4HzcCqBsbh4xX7ZEvt_eyzUjuqS7pe58WC-FYdYquW7BpoKHOLc73jhyHr3oG00QJB5Mly9Zyy4xXAiR3LK3GlGcvHM2C4d58R6MKJLIiMrByxBDPIC5_iQEfmWz78GmSqq7uIl9fmBZv6pZ93GcyVmaKRyLK1gdjnX-Wi7s9qkJh5kApsriS573X_4B1q51RV-cUL8N2bs3cntJSnK-ZHWv1d8qViD5yDKJYANURZL7B5jhjD9PND3n-bL_vsQwO_s1IqX0X6hvaiRxT9Zn9t2pmQO_URpGKLzl8Y7Png-K6LZf5TQZFgyg9fs_Uxgbz6ugeXzm0xP_6NoHOLloFdQWEur7YWccZR8lcewcq8iZ0F7eA%3D%3D)**

**Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home.**

When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground.

When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back.

**I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now**.

Now,**[I’m asking for the honor of standing up and fighting for every American against the far-Left’s all-out-assault on our democratic freedoms](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f0f7fd7d4727474da150084c63ac5063&_e=u6qyLq5GTc6ZAnVFoTfNA106vZ4aZe6QcXjBp-i2F2-N5IAZgFX5wYqGLLnsU3c6y7uc5KaP0OiTbHUCm7atV0kBEkCW7wlWXlKxT4HzcCqBsbh4xX7ZEvt_eyzUjuqS7pe58WC-FYdYquW7BpoKHOLc73jhyHr3oG00QJB5Mly9Zyy4xXAiR3LK3GlGcvHM2C4d58R6MKJLIiMrByxBDPIC5_iQEfmWz78GmSqq7uIl9fmBZv6pZ93GcyVmaKRyI1vrADIrW0hBZold4TODCvWJ7TAHIKxN163axoPIvkVGQx_3tMg-bB41VODWgZ490LiwQn1xlP4D6UMh5GID3DF3AnA5G3DWG4H9xbkeNF6cHQ9EtPW1sHXIDlU6vleS0JAH0MeDGjWa83Dq95ttE_lm8lpZB-D2YJ780HkwpXzXCEeexBSvWiWiDIscG2wktcAtxiGgYQhzZps5uHAoIQ%3D%3D)**.

**Here is my ask of you today:** Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, **[will you chip-in whatever you can afford today to help me start my campaign for the Senate on the strongest note possible?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f0f7fd7d4727474da150084c63ac5063&_e=u6qyLq5GTc6ZAnVFoTfNA106vZ4aZe6QcXjBp-i2F2-N5IAZgFX5wYqGLLnsU3c6y7uc5KaP0OiTbHUCm7atV0kBEkCW7wlWXlKxT4HzcCqBsbh4xX7ZEvt_eyzUjuqS7pe58WC-FYdYquW7BpoKHOLc73jhyHr3oG00QJB5Mly9Zyy4xXAiR3LK3GlGcvHM2C4d58R6MKJLIiMrByxBDPIC5_iQEfmWz78GmSqq7uIl9fmBZv6pZ93GcyVmaKRy-rT7-tRNU5_bK-7Hhdrp3_pMcEa8z0sVDtTI9j2Sd7cWOibFVmU3w1w6Y68uigz2W_Ou1ozy6LgDN8d79t-dCuOewXU6c4zZoN90fhBmPDBoOun8I0rnPkdhHRRaSbj90DdGM3FnyrZSeltlDygOCnReV1k9enMWNRco479jvKUB3vEUK7gxcw6f3na_EN24tAuarQKAue4Yqmot8OEb2A%3D%3D)**

You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you.

**And I will always defend our police.**

**[I hope you’ll do me the honor of supporting my candidacy for U.S. Senate today, and chipping-in a few dollars if you can](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f0f7fd7d4727474da150084c63ac5063&_e=u6qyLq5GTc6ZAnVFoTfNA106vZ4aZe6QcXjBp-i2F2-N5IAZgFX5wYqGLLnsU3c6y7uc5KaP0OiTbHUCm7atV0kBEkCW7wlWXlKxT4HzcCqBsbh4xX7ZEvt_eyzUjuqS7pe58WC-FYdYquW7BpoKHOLc73jhyHr3oG00QJB5Mly9Zyy4xXAiR3LK3GlGcvHM2C4d58R6MKJLIiMrByxBDPIC5_iQEfmWz78GmSqq7uIl9fmBZv6pZ93GcyVmaKRyeGi2ZKbRGEeXUJtCqxVHwUOfNq8g9UMmkpVyAa1FwS6RAgUXXQ4bKwjcBdkEOSUwQ2VTqk-T_u_FOI_umERXwi1WBZ16wG-RUec_sLgW9SBzLWqMsQgR3or96mW28BuYCsiFhEjNvHyYwty2iUN_1Mc5_28sxQVu0KXiyTluTOCx7wyToPvaUjOVsr8K5mpr7IpPaxXyxPvf-bQrPLUj0g%3D%3D)**.

The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us. I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life. Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home. When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground. When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back. I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now. Now,. Here is my ask of you today: Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, Fellow American, you can count on me to protect and defend our Constitutional liberties. You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you. And I will always defend our police. . For America, Mark McCloskey | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: Press Release - Bull Moose Project Endorses Joe Kent

body:
Latest Press Release from Joe Kent | | | |
---
| | | **DATE: May 18, 2021**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Byron Sanford ** **Cell: 360.210.6943**
[**byron@joekentforcongress.com**](mailto:byron@joekentforcongress.com)
---
|
####
# **Bull Moose Project Endorses Joe Kent**

Battle Ground, WA— Today, the Bull Moose Project endorsed Joe Kent for Congress in Washington's Third Congressional District.

---
| The Bull Moose Project made the following statement:
The Bull Moose Project is proud to endorse Joe Kent for Congress in Washington's Third Congressional District. Joe is an economic nationalist. He understands that our economy currently works for the corporations, not the people, and that must change. Immigration plays a huge role in fixing the economy, and Joe wants to cut low-skilled legal immigration that harms American workers. In addition, Joe understands we must finally combat the Communist Party of China to preserve American hegemony throughout the world.

Candidate Joe Kent made the following statement:

I am honored to have the endorsement from a patriotic organization of young conservatives. The Bull Moose Project consists of everyday Americans. They believe in making our nation great by protecting and revitalizing our manufacturing industry, defending the sanctity of life, and fighting for the survival of our Judeo-Christian heritage. The Bull Moose Senior Advisor is Gavin Wax, who is renowned in the young conservative movement. As the 73rd president of the New York Young Republican Club, Gavin has made the NYYRC the largest active Republican youth chapter nationwide. With young patriots from the Bull Moose Project behind this campaign, it is clear the momentum is on our side. We will save America from the far-left, the corporations, and the RINOs within.

The Bull Moose Project and Candidate Joe are both available for interviews. If interested, please email Byron Sanford at byron@joekentforcongress.com or via cell at 360.210.6943.

###

socialist threat with your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45 TODAY!")** The DC Swamp has only just begun trying to silence me, and now that I am gaining momentum in this race for the Senate, they will redouble their efforts. **If they 're going to be stuck with Republicans in the U.S. Senate, they want them to be RINOs like Mitt Romney, but thanks to patriots like you, they're going to get a real, America First Conservative with me!** Together, we can finally expose the Big Lie and unmask Democrats for the corrupt traitors that they are. We will defeat their socialist attacks on our Constitution and restore the American Dream. Then, we will hold Debbie Wasserman Schultz accountable for her attempts to rig the 2016 Election, and Eric Swalwell accountable for feeding secrets to a Chinese Spy. Do you think that's **_WHY_** they don't want me to talk? **[Help me stand up to the radical left today!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57430310:6qjk0plvN:m:1:3103520637:97D70CFA58DA7283A3EBF68923A282E9:r "Help me stand up to the radical left today!")** For America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57430310:6qjk0plvN:m:1:3103520637:97D70CFA58DA7283A3EBF68923A282E9:r "Mo Brooks")

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Scott Perry on Capitol Riots: "I'd do it again"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
https://eugeneforcongress.com/ [https://eugeneforcongress.com/]
Friend,
On January 6, we all watched in horror on live TV as a violent mob attacked our Capitol. As one of the instigators of the plot to overturn our elections that led to that attack, Scott Perry has no shame, no regrets, and no problem doing it all again. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ep2021]
A man who does not value or respect our democracy has no place representing us in Congress — and the difference between Scott Perry and the rest of the Sedition Caucus is that he represents a swing district and is uniquely vulnerable.
That’s why I’m strongly considering taking him on again in 2022, but I need your help now. We can’t let Scott Perry and his insurrectionist pals in the Republican Party go unchecked. We have to hold him accountable every single day until Election Day, November 8, 2022.
Help me build a campaign to get Scott Perry out of our Capitol by donating $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ep2021]
Four hundred years ago, America’s democracy was forged in Pennsylvania. But just four months ago, we saw just how fragile our democratic system is when we watched a mob attack our Capitol with the intent of overthrowing our democratically elected government. Scott Perry doesn’t represent our values and he violated his oath to uphold the Constitution of the United States.
We need to send a message to the world that we won’t tolerate this kind of appalling behavior from our Member of Congress
Can you do your part to protect Pennsylvania’s proud legacy by donating $25 so we can send Scott Perry packing?
We have a long road ahead of us, but I know we have what it takes to defeat Scott Perry and his dangerous insurrectionist views if we do it together.
Thank you,
Eugene

Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:
https://www.facebook.com/DePasqualePA/ [https://www.facebook.com/DePasqualePA/] https://twitter.com/DePasqualePA [https://twitter.com/DePasqualePA] https://www.instagram.com/eugene_depasquale/ [https://www.instagram.com/eugene_depasquale/]
Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit EugeneForCongress.com [https://eugeneforcongress.com/] .

name: Samson Signori
subject: Governor Northam's message
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Jay Jones for Attorney General
body:
Friend --
Governor Northam is supporting Jay Jones for Attorney General because he knows that while we've made progress in building a more fair and equitable Virginia, we still have plenty more work to do.
**[Please take a moment to read Governor Northam 's message then donate as generously as you can so we can bring real justice reform to Virginia.](https://act.myngp.com/el/j27teS7P5sKPkWRKB9ax-sAGawf1sSpXuMstRWDONH0=/_rXET2VxsWfKQzK3oKvqBnelrggT-ILYkjHyj9boIOQ=)**
\- Samson Signori
_Begin forwarded message:_
|
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/j27teS7P5sKPkWRKB9ax-sAGawf1sSpXuMstRWDONH0=/ebfBX_jiD_bwfzf6WRjPxsJ6Fk7KtdPvZveESAvPD4M=)
---
Friend, Over the past four years, we've made monumental progress on justice reform. We've ended no-knock warrants and become the first state in the South to both abolish the death penalty and legalize marijuana. This November, Republicans will stop at nothing to turn back our progress. _**That 's why I'm proud to endorse Jay Jones to be our next Attorney General.**_ Jay is running for Attorney General because he knows that while we've made progress in building a more fair and equitable Virginia, we still have plenty more work to do. [**I 'm asking you directly - please contribute $20 to Jay's historic campaign to become Virginia's first Black Attorney General today so we can build on the progress we've made together.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/j27teS7P5sKPkWRKB9ax-sAGawf1sSpXuMstRWDONH0=/_rXET2VxsWfKQzK3oKvqBnelrggT-ILYkjHyj9boIOQ=) The vestiges of slavery and Jim Crow live on in our Commonwealth's criminal code, in our judicial system, and in our policing. They criminalize Black and Brown communities and make every Virginian less safe. Jay is the leader who will rise to meet this historic moment in our country and in our Commonwealth to create real change in our justice system. Take care, Ralph Northam **[P.S. Click here to read Jay 's full Justice Reform plan!](https://act.myngp.com/el/j27teS7P5sKPkWRKB9ax-sAGawf1sSpXuMstRWDONH0=/HVPD-srbambq_SYCPWNxYncK6CsC2mUerW_zRQMk8os=)**

body:
This is the fatal blow
Click [here to opt out](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9705041/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk3MDUwNDE%3d&x=4eb956cf).

Friend -
It's crunch time in the MUST WIN Texas Special Election Run-Off -- and we are biting our nails here.
There are LESS than 48 hours until our first **MAJOR FEC Special Election fundraising deadline** and we are behind.
We'll be blunt: If we can't catch up, **this could be a fatal blow.**
[**So we are asking you directly -- can we count on you to step up and chip in just $5 before midnight so that we can claw our way back into this? **](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9705041/224717773/200604/3/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=ce3c3481)
Our conservative candidate, Jake Ellzey, is a retired Navy pilot who has the grit to win this race, help retire Pelosi, and advance the America First agenda.
But we'll never get there without support from grassroots patriots.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: A Washington Post hit piece
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57433329:Jz5djLlN7:m:1:3206719985:3D7D8106122063EB0C2C6942751B0D11:r "Headline") Peter: I'm now a 41-year-old member of the United States Senate, a father, husband, Christian, and former clerk for the Chief Justice of the United States Supreme Court, and former Attorney General for my state. None of that seems to matter to the left. Just the other day, _The Washington Post_ published a profile story on me, and they thought it was more important to find out why someone who attended Middle School with me is disappointed that we have divergent political views and then accuse my hometown of being inherently racist. This is how Conservatives are treated in this nation when they stand up for their beliefs. They will look for any way to hurt us. They even have someone suggesting I should wear an "S" on my shirt for "sedition." **[If the Swamp is willing to go this far to destroy me, it is clear they are only just getting started. That is why I am writing today asking for your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57433329:Jz5djLlN7:m:1:3206719985:3D7D8106122063EB0C2C6942751B0D11:r "If the Swamp is willing to go this far to destroy me, it
is clear they are only just getting started. That is why I am writing today asking for your help.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57433329:Jz5djLlN7:m:1:3206719985:3D7D8106122063EB0C2C6942751B0D11:r "Childhood home")I knew that Big Tech would try to make me pay when I started standing up to them, but I never expected Jeff Bezos to go this far. I'm not joking - **_The Washington Post_ tracked down a person I worked with when I was 12 years old** to see what they thought of my objection. They interviewed friends of mine from high school; they **_even hid behind bushes to take a picture of my childhood home and looked into the books I read as a child._** **[Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $1200, even just $45 will let Big Tech and the Media know that their scare tactics won't work on American Conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57433330:Jz5djLlN7:m:1:3206719985:3D7D8106122063EB0C2C6942751B0D11:r "Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $1200, even just $45 will
let Big Tech and the Media know that their scare tactics won’t work on American Conservatives.")** **They just want to punish me for standing up for YOU and formally objecting to the 2020 election results. It isn 't going to work, and it won't stop me from keeping up my fight against Big Tech.** I did not come to Washington to win a popularity contest with the establishment. It is my job to represent the people of Missouri, and I knew that the Swamp would try to make me pay. They have already tried to cancel me. Antifa showed up at my home here while my wife and 4-month-old daughter were home. Now, the radical left is looking into my actions when I was a child to intimidate me. Still, they never seem to care when we have Members of Congress siding with known terrorists in the Middle East instead of our best ally, Israel. While they have the wrong priorities, their tactics won't work on me - but it helps to know who is still standing with me. **[Will you please make your most generous contribution of $50 or more, so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57433331:Jz5djLlN7:m:1:3206719985:3D7D8106122063EB0C2C6942751B0D11:r "Will you please make your most
generous contribution of $50 or more, so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly
appreciated.")** The last time I wrote you, I told you that it was a question of "when" the Swamp would come after me. _I was right, and we can now all see how far they are willing to go._ **[I'm going to fight back. Are you with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57433330:Jz5djLlN7:m:1:3206719985:3D7D8106122063EB0C2C6942751B0D11:r "I’m going to fight back. Are you with me?")** For America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57433329:Jz5djLlN7:m:1:3206719985:3D7D8106122063EB0C2C6942751B0D11:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri P.S. Bezos and _The Washington Post_ aren't done with me. I need to be ready the next time they interview someone I shared fingerpaints with when I was five years old. **[I need your help to fend off their ridiculous smears. Please donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57433329:Jz5djLlN7:m:1:3206719985:3D7D8106122063EB0C2C6942751B0D11:r "I need your help to fend off their ridiculous smears. Please
donate today.")** | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57433329:Jz5djLlN7:m:1:3206719985:3D7D8106122063EB0C2C6942751B0D11:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
| **PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
---

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Reproductive rights are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friend,
Reproductive rights are under attack. The Supreme Court just announced they’re hearing a case that’s a direct challenge to Roe v. Wade.
Remember when everyone said Justices Brett Kavanaugh and Amy Coney Barrett would be a big threat to Roe’s precedent?
They might get their chance to overturn the landmark case, especially since they’ve got a 6-3 conservative majority.
It’s time we end attacks on abortion and reproductive rights for good. Now is the time for us to demand that Congress make reproductive freedom the law of the land.
**Will you join me in demanding that Congress move quickly to enshrine Roe v. Wade into law? We can’t leave abortion rights in the hands of Mitch McConnell’s Supreme Court.**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29413361/286329136/-884334289?refcode=em210519-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGFhODliOS1iNWI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hgDaqh8s5-cwqn5QFqfpCxL89_878JqoEB7yz_Mq9dk=&emci=5c2d9c5f-b4b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=40aa89b9-b5b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18034979)**
The Supreme Court’s ruling on this case could overturn all that Roe v. Wade has protected for the last 48 years.
We don’t need politicians or judges interfering with anyone’s right to choose.
I know exactly what it’s like to have that pit in your stomach when the Supreme Court is in session. Wondering which one of your basic rights will be taken away or at least up for debate. We need more Senators who do as well.
I’ve watched my GOP colleagues in Harrisburg hold sham hearings and spread disinformation about abortion, but the truth is simple: Reproductive health care is health care.
[If you agree, will you join me today in demanding that Congress pass legislation to protect reproductive rights for good?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29413362/286329137/-884334289?refcode=em210519-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGFhODliOS1iNWI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hgDaqh8s5-cwqn5QFqfpCxL89_878JqoEB7yz_Mq9dk=&emci=5c2d9c5f-b4b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=40aa89b9-b5b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18034979)
Thank you for taking action today,
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Joe Collins for Congress
subject: California Coming In Dead Last at This
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Collins for Congress | 5777 CENTURY BLVD, STE 1110-143, Los Angeles, CA 90045
body:
Vote Governor Newsom Out
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aTWogSEigR0DUYYW-jta7zdof7CkmkEFPN5-DQq8buce3BFK5pXt0lreAbxxHIk0ziHoiGkwi4f0rvZBLpOmfoBDy7IX5hDI6UHflaB2A0z3-deggCzp-RaVeVRFk6Dw9mHrQC7DhoRq4VQ7j_d8KpQyplxAdefn5Kve-XR_dhtjIZ2LhTKbqGVj_2wKsBNR&c=mEQO7Rq9y4qUp5Ruij1pDynJ_KFIo8KakcNZLntl7b6eBI_FKuq2Eg==&ch=S0M58Wy0j1DrJ7iteSMXuPxg6T4om7xq1bao1DkJZmibme3Zy4ZKlw==&jrc=1)
---
| We Have a Chance, We MUST Vote Newsom Out
---
| | |
---
| Hello Peter,
---
| Governor Newsom has spent more than a year following the liberal mantra of fear and panic. He locked the whole state down, devastating small businesses and families. He has destroyed our economy, while other states, whose governors have been far less restrictive, have done just fine.
---
| | | [Click HERE to End Gavin's Reign of Fear](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aTWogSEigR0DUYYW-jta7zdof7CkmkEFPN5-DQq8buce3BFK5pXt0lreAbxxHIk0ziHoiGkwi4f0rvZBLpOmfoBDy7IX5hDI6UHflaB2A0z3-deggCzp-RaVeVRFk6Dw9mHrQC7DhoRq4VQ7j_d8KpQyplxAdefn5Kve-XR_dhtjIZ2LhTKbqGVj_2wKsBNR&c=mEQO7Rq9y4qUp5Ruij1pDynJ_KFIo8KakcNZLntl7b6eBI_FKuq2Eg==&ch=S0M58Wy0j1DrJ7iteSMXuPxg6T4om7xq1bao1DkJZmibme3Zy4ZKlw==&jrc=1)
---
| This is literally the reason that Gavin Newsom will be on the ballot for a recall soon. Voters know that he has not been the leader we need, but has, instead, led us down a path of unwarranted liberal economic devastation.
---
| | | [Click HERE to Bring Change to California](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aTWogSEigR0DUYYW-jta7zdof7CkmkEFPN5-DQq8buce3BFK5pXt0lreAbxxHIk0ziHoiGkwi4f0rvZBLpOmfoBDy7IX5hDI6UHflaB2A0z3-deggCzp-RaVeVRFk6Dw9mHrQC7DhoRq4VQ7j_d8KpQyplxAdefn5Kve-XR_dhtjIZ2LhTKbqGVj_2wKsBNR&c=mEQO7Rq9y4qUp5Ruij1pDynJ_KFIo8KakcNZLntl7b6eBI_FKuq2Eg==&ch=S0M58Wy0j1DrJ7iteSMXuPxg6T4om7xq1bao1DkJZmibme3Zy4ZKlw==&jrc=1)
---
| We put Newsom on the ballot for a recall but, instead of listening to his constituents, and learning something, he just proved again that he is simply incompetent to lead. The CDC just released new Covid-19 guidelines that allow for fully vaccinated people to go unmasked, both indoors and outdoors. The CDC says it is safe for fully vaccinated people to do so, but Governor Newsom, apparently, knows better (just ask him).
Gov Newsom is not going to lift the mask mandate until [June 15](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aTWogSEigR0DUYYW-jta7zdof7CkmkEFPN5-DQq8buce3BFK5pXt0vBl32qkxNXFEMuuXr0tO5V6FYGoD3RjNyIHb-KgFxYKKaXfaAIfcT5K1RZXIUHslOGciznHZR1gCNKbY4Hst2eEVvzDp2mQ-dyk8xiIQ21EqWL57-ZH4FKKjQDoJ_w6Of9w5CaO2QKtSYL8LDOMxQFezOZzmg7uIHuYDHS4E7cmJIuJtBTax2nFVfb_i2RF1DLtq-gKDKaw&c=mEQO7Rq9y4qUp5Ruij1pDynJ_KFIo8KakcNZLntl7b6eBI_FKuq2Eg==&ch=S0M58Wy0j1DrJ7iteSMXuPxg6T4om7xq1bao1DkJZmibme3Zy4ZKlw==&jrc=1), making California one of the last, if not THE last, state to do so. The liberals, while spending a full year whining about how we must follow the science, ARE NOT FOLLOWING THE SCIENCE.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: January 6th, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gYdIRod3M4H6-JMq48oTjuyXLCJQGhZBAPOX-aGIDeU=/fhaMzY6i4FZ0eBAxynq3uRXpNOQhDGZk0AydTbalOy0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210519-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

On January 6th, 2021, violent insurrectionists attacked America's Capitol building, and with it, they threatened American democracy writ large.

Incited by lies and conspiracies about the results of the 2020 election, these rioters attacked police officers with bear spray, bike racks, broken scaffolding, fire extinguishers, and even American flag poles.

Officers desperately fought to protect everyone inside the Capitol complex, including the Members of Congress, legislative staff, custodial and food service staff, journalists, and the Vice President of the United States.

**These brave police officers protected us. They fought to hold the line against the violence of the insurrectionists. They fought to hold the line to protect our democracy.**

I was in the Chamber during the assault on the Capitol. I watched as colleagues prayed and cried, and as we deployed gas masks, climbed across the gallery seating, and took cover between rows of seats, following the commands of the police officers fighting to keep us safe.

During the insurrection, I texted my husband dark-humored updates as I tried to stay calm but worried about how he would tell my children about the attack. I took a selfie of myself smiling so that in case things ended poorly, my kids would know I had been okay.

**The insurrectionists harmed our Capitol that day, defacing its majesty and disrespecting its honor. But their efforts to thwart our democracy failed. **

While the events of that day remain impossible to forget, there are still questions about the events of that day, and the days leading up to it, that merit further investigation. That's why my colleagues and I voted this week to create a bipartisan commission to investigate the events leading up to the attack.

**Mirroring the 9/11 Commission that looked into the terrorist attack and its origins, we hope to reveal greater truths about what happened on January 6th, how it happened, and how we can prevent a similar tragedy from happening moving forward.**

We owe it to the nation to dig into this catastrophe in more detail. The events of January 6th cost lives and threatened the foundations of our democracy, and we all deserve to truly understand this catastrophe. This commission is an important step towards gaining that understanding.

Thank you all for listening. I am wishing you all strength and sending my appreciation for your engagement, even when the topics are heavy.

-Abigail

---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Why Does AOC Support Terrorism?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Everyone be careful, AOC has been triggered. I tried to talk to her the other day, and she literally ran away, and then called the police on me.
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZqoW2RyVdG5yVzPkhfkQvQ/nPG1Mi763pTSSnu0OFxjkqTw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Greene for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZqoW2RyVdG5yVzPkhfkQvQ/nPG1Mi763pTSSnu0OFxjkqTw)**.
---

---
| [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZqoW2RyVdG5yVzPkhfkQvQ/nPG1Mi763pTSSnu0OFxjkqTw "Headline") Fellow Patriot, Everyone be careful, AOC has been triggered. I tried to talk to her the other day, and she literally ran away, and then called the police on me. According to AOC, who champions the defund movement, Congress isn't a "safe space," so a five-foot two-inch woman is scary when she asks you a few questions:
* Why do you hate America?
* Why do you support Antifa?
* Why do you support Hamas terrorists?
* When are you going to debate me on your Green New Deal proposals?

**Now her friend Nancy Pelosi wants me referred to the House Ethics Committee! All for the crime of asking a few questions. Is this still America!?!** **[I need your help to fight back! Will you make your most generous donation of $25, $50 or $100, and help me fend off the radical left attack machine here in Congress?](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ajdLcN0w2Nqhiz2Lqe5rFA/nPG1Mi763pTSSnu0OFxjkqTw "I need your help to fight back! Will you make your most generous donation of $25, $50 or $100, and help me fend off the radical left attack machine here in Congress?")** I'm not Liz Cheney or Mitch McConnell. **I wasn 't sent here by the people of Georgia's 14th District to hold hands and sip tea - I was sent here to fight for our liberty and to stop the slide towards socialism.** I'm here to stop the radical left from destroying our nation and I'm going to confront them on why they have such divergent ideas. I'm quite certain the American people want us discussing ideas, not coddling up to illegal aliens or Hamas terrorists killing innocent children in Israel. _Any Member of Congress who is siding with terrorists over our friends in Israel is literally committing treason. What 's Pelosi doing about that?_ **[I need your help to fight AOC and the radical leftists in Congress! Please donate $50 or more and help me hold them accountable for trying to destroy our nation!](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/lnjYxwWPtyn6XRfNn38LRQ/nPG1Mi763pTSSnu0OFxjkqTw "I need your help to fight AOC and the radical leftists in Congress! Please donate $50 or more and help me hold them accountable for trying to destroy our nation!")** That's right - the same woman who wants to take away your right to own a gun, and defund the police in your neighborhood, [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZqoW2RyVdG5yVzPkhfkQvQ/nPG1Mi763pTSSnu0OFxjkqTw "Tweet")**needs armed security and the entire House Ethics Committee to protect her from people asking her questions she doesn 't like.** This is what Democrats do when you try to hold them accountable - they hide behind armed guards and call you a racist. They are hypocrites, and they don't scare me. **[If you aren't scared either, then I need you to help me send a message. I am looking for 402 Brave Patriots to stand with me in the next 24 hours and let the leftists know we aggressively champion freedom. Any donation from $5 to $2,900 adds your name to this list.](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZqoW2RyVdG5yVzPkhfkQvQ/nPG1Mi763pTSSnu0OFxjkqTw "If you aren't scared either, then I need you to help me send a message. I am looking for 402 Brave Patriots to stand with me in the next 24 hours and let the leftists know we aggressively champion freedom. Any donation from $5 to $2,900 adds your name to this list.")** **Together, we will send a message that the snowflakes won 't be able to hide from.** AOC is a grown woman - she needs to start acting like it! She needs to start taking the advice of an old Democrat, President Harry Truman, who once said, " If you can't stand the heat, get out of the kitchen!" She can go back to her old job at the bar if she doesn't have the guts to face me, because I love this nation, and I will never stop fighting to preserve our liberty. I don't care if the press calls me a "meany" or I have to hurt someone's feelings to do so, but I'm not going to let them destroy our nation or implement socialism. **[Will you help me hold AOC accountable? I need to know if you are standing with me TODAY!](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZqoW2RyVdG5yVzPkhfkQvQ/nPG1Mi763pTSSnu0OFxjkqTw "Will you help me hold AOC accountable? I need to know if you are standing with me TODAY!")** God Bless America, [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZqoW2RyVdG5yVzPkhfkQvQ/nPG1Mi763pTSSnu0OFxjkqTw "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tcmhw47ptG8ek7KLB3gRi8TfyrXJkKlCvNI5N04JJAAz4HQsMgWr84x8Y522v-QMlOEdvSSpkTZNQr13m326GzlWQyqCdEq0AjFqnnfLBJhZJZrafORKcik6JnWmpbay1KPSJAQ0s1XbkvPiZ6mquo9RSfunSSzublVdqHXDhZ8E5BK0u6icK8W-G24KKunOkO3oPXyu8gpQehWMDHXUqDTNcjmUAV8UpJvGwAdsniJ8CFTbl7l5ZI7c991TFZnABAVtSb3gKTnQ-eILuN9XekFW772wD5BE6jL3BJw8HaBd37odQuKXgAJCcd00I5G-QL7M2xa0bUb9h_C3Lsc_XEXPthF7SJ9LPe8vS853LLT35mkxgo7HlwuWFu-F8Fj93L4Z1mEqK0hbw_isvw-L0lYcWLpq7PCzckvxSJI2PQteAq5lIofgbtvhl606WjplmjOVzGodem0=&c=Lqv4Os5_dgO4pr_62wi9d-OhtkRjP8TAFwZQ6qwT2oUAsdrBbR8qoA==&ch=iZNX7XWaA5ojXA9o5LakZwE9_8EoZYolurdFzUKKY2GTGDZ984zfVQ==)
Friend --

It's May which means it's **Military Appreciation Month!**

As a combat veteran myself, I know firsthand the sacrifice that these brave men and women have made for our country. I am proud to honor those who are in the Armed Forces fighting to protect our great nation each and every day.

Friend, I need your help TODAY and throughout this month to give an extra thanks to all the brave men and women who serve to protect each and every one of us. [_**Add your name to say THANK YOU today!**_](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tcmhw47ptG8ek7KLB3gRi8TfyrXJkKlCvNI5N04JJAAz4HQsMgWr84x8Y522v-QMlOEdvSSpkTZNQr13m326GzlWQyqCdEq0AjFqnnfLBJhZJZrafORKcik6JnWmpbay1KPSJAQ0s1XbkvPiZ6mquo9RSfunSSzublVdqHXDhZ8E5BK0u6icK8W-G24KKunOkO3oPXyu8gpQehWMDHXUqDTNcjmUAV8UpJvGwAdsniJ8CFTbl7l5ZI7c991TFZnABAVtSb3gKTnQ-eILuN9XekFW772wD5BE6jL3BJw8HaBd37odQuKXgAJCcd00I5G-QL7M2xa0bUb9h_C3Lsc_XEXPthF7SJ9LPe8vS853LLT35mkxgo7HlwuWFu-F8Fj93L4Z1mEqK0hbw_isvw-L0lYcWLpq7PCzckvxSJI2PQteAq5lIofgbtvhl606WjplmjOVzGodem0=&c=Lqv4Os5_dgO4pr_62wi9d-OhtkRjP8TAFwZQ6qwT2oUAsdrBbR8qoA==&ch=iZNX7XWaA5ojXA9o5LakZwE9_8EoZYolurdFzUKKY2GTGDZ984zfVQ==)
**[**Say THANK YOU**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tcmhw47ptG8ek7KLB3gRi8TfyrXJkKlCvNI5N04JJAAz4HQsMgWr84x8Y522v-QMlOEdvSSpkTZNQr13m326GzlWQyqCdEq0AjFqnnfLBJhZJZrafORKcik6JnWmpbay1KPSJAQ0s1XbkvPiZ6mquo9RSfunSSzublVdqHXDhZ8E5BK0u6icK8W-G24KKunOkO3oPXyu8gpQehWMDHXUqDTNcjmUAV8UpJvGwAdsniJ8CFTbl7l5ZI7c991TFZnABAVtSb3gKTnQ-eILuN9XekFW772wD5BE6jL3BJw8HaBd37odQuKXgAJCcd00I5G-QL7M2xa0bUb9h_C3Lsc_XEXPthF7SJ9LPe8vS853LLT35mkxgo7HlwuWFu-F8Fj93L4Z1mEqK0hbw_isvw-L0lYcWLpq7PCzckvxSJI2PQteAq5lIofgbtvhl606WjplmjOVzGodem0=&c=Lqv4Os5_dgO4pr_62wi9d-OhtkRjP8TAFwZQ6qwT2oUAsdrBbR8qoA==&ch=iZNX7XWaA5ojXA9o5LakZwE9_8EoZYolurdFzUKKY2GTGDZ984zfVQ==)**
---
I encourage you to join me in paying tribute to those who currently serve our country, along with those who have previously served, and thank them for their selfless sacrifice.
**[**Say THANK YOU**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tcmhw47ptG8ek7KLB3gRi8TfyrXJkKlCvNI5N04JJAAz4HQsMgWr84x8Y522v-QMlOEdvSSpkTZNQr13m326GzlWQyqCdEq0AjFqnnfLBJhZJZrafORKcik6JnWmpbay1KPSJAQ0s1XbkvPiZ6mquo9RSfunSSzublVdqHXDhZ8E5BK0u6icK8W-G24KKunOkO3oPXyu8gpQehWMDHXUqDTNcjmUAV8UpJvGwAdsniJ8CFTbl7l5ZI7c991TFZnABAVtSb3gKTnQ-eILuN9XekFW772wD5BE6jL3BJw8HaBd37odQuKXgAJCcd00I5G-QL7M2xa0bUb9h_C3Lsc_XEXPthF7SJ9LPe8vS853LLT35mkxgo7HlwuWFu-F8Fj93L4Z1mEqK0hbw_isvw-L0lYcWLpq7PCzckvxSJI2PQteAq5lIofgbtvhl606WjplmjOVzGodem0=&c=Lqv4Os5_dgO4pr_62wi9d-OhtkRjP8TAFwZQ6qwT2oUAsdrBbR8qoA==&ch=iZNX7XWaA5ojXA9o5LakZwE9_8EoZYolurdFzUKKY2GTGDZ984zfVQ==)**

body:
Biden was warned what would happen...

| | |
---
It's time President Biden takes responsibility for this border crisis! It was _his_ open border policies that sparked this unprecedented border surge and now _he_ needs to stop it. This crisis is too BIG to ignore.

Our southern border states are completely overwhelmed by the number of migrants crossing into our country. Instead of restoring our security, President Biden is forcing states to fix his mess. GOP governors refuse to let Biden force his catastrophe on the entire country. Now it is spilling over into other states. name: Rep. Ann Wagner
subject: Israel is our ally
body:
We must stand with our friends in their time of need

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eehVzip4bU6pB2ZFBAkvN-1JjvXlmcUHPSTkvKlKNEpE7alQzbhs0L7DegKf8JmPNctCFjzUTntURJwBOl2L6B-8rdorRziuhCbYRgW9ZOWCqMnhzIp8fgHqvkul_hoGzndhQ1KRXqXQ55F-DpgRcBzlTb02Ybb1d_BFI_vfGJ4f4x_eASgLVuwU1mXeMfcOx3a6V-YzkxLY_hKnuXqkculJVHBjLFZGt3rqE3GZkQBbGMAhgkiHGrUDpVrxaTynQB1YQcghJB-VSc3l7-G7kFVM0FqtAfxXfq4d5xz4NGjweA-XbvaSTktz3t8jmLQ73Q1Q-28ReGd3qchYA20c9YQBY8LhGoSRSI0tNX2IuVPio7cuWXeJptX-kLvo7DPd&c=oX-3atWz86lyH6_j8k7dns_JQ5IBLQWttaxSO-lmQlMmfGnH0Et8Hg==&ch=nLZZ9WUQiebmMwmiNeaUuLFoEdHXo7RpNAg1-WZ438mdfFIK43wZzQ==) Friend,

**Israel is our ally and friend, and right now they are under attack. **

I've been working hard to help Israel, and bring peace and stability to the region, and right now as they face a terrorist assault they need us now more than ever.

**But where is Joe Biden? Where is Kamala Harris?**

Instead of taking action to support our friends in Israel, the Biden administration remains focused on enacting their radical, liberal agenda. I can't sit back and let this happen anymore. [**Will you join me in standing with Israel TODAY, Friend?**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eehVzip4bU6pB2ZFBAkvN-1JjvXlmcUHPSTkvKlKNEpE7alQzbhs0L7DegKf8JmPNctCFjzUTntURJwBOl2L6B-8rdorRziuhCbYRgW9ZOWCqMnhzIp8fgHqvkul_hoGzndhQ1KRXqXQ55F-DpgRcBzlTb02Ybb1d_BFI_vfGJ4f4x_eASgLVuwU1mXeMfcOx3a6V-YzkxLY_hKnuXqkculJVHBjLFZGt3rqE3GZkQBbGMAhgkiHGrUDpVrxaTynQB1YQcghJB-VSc3l7-G7kFVM0FqtAfxXfq4d5xz4NGjweA-XbvaSTktz3t8jmLQ73Q1Q-28ReGd3qchYA20c9YQBY8LhGoSRSI0tNX2IuVPio7cuWXeJptX-kLvo7DPd&c=oX-3atWz86lyH6_j8k7dns_JQ5IBLQWttaxSO-lmQlMmfGnH0Et8Hg==&ch=nLZZ9WUQiebmMwmiNeaUuLFoEdHXo7RpNAg1-WZ438mdfFIK43wZzQ==)
**[**Stand with Israel**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eehVzip4bU6pB2ZFBAkvN-1JjvXlmcUHPSTkvKlKNEpE7alQzbhs0L7DegKf8JmPNctCFjzUTntURJwBOl2L6B-8rdorRziuhCbYRgW9ZOWCqMnhzIp8fgHqvkul_hoGzndhQ1KRXqXQ55F-DpgRcBzlTb02Ybb1d_BFI_vfGJ4f4x_eASgLVuwU1mXeMfcOx3a6V-YzkxLY_hKnuXqkculJVHBjLFZGt3rqE3GZkQBbGMAhgkiHGrUDpVrxaTynQB1YQcghJB-VSc3l7-G7kFVM0FqtAfxXfq4d5xz4NGjweA-XbvaSTktz3t8jmLQ73Q1Q-28ReGd3qchYA20c9YQBY8LhGoSRSI0tNX2IuVPio7cuWXeJptX-kLvo7DPd&c=oX-3atWz86lyH6_j8k7dns_JQ5IBLQWttaxSO-lmQlMmfGnH0Et8Hg==&ch=nLZZ9WUQiebmMwmiNeaUuLFoEdHXo7RpNAg1-WZ438mdfFIK43wZzQ==)** It's evident that Joe Biden doesn't care about Israel and our relationship with them. That's why it's absolutely critical that you and I make our voices heard NOW. [**Join me in standing with Israel - Sign the petition today.**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eehVzip4bU6pB2ZFBAkvN-1JjvXlmcUHPSTkvKlKNEpE7alQzbhs0L7DegKf8JmPNctCFjzUTntURJwBOl2L6B-8rdorRziuhCbYRgW9ZOWCqMnhzIp8fgHqvkul_hoGzndhQ1KRXqXQ55F-DpgRcBzlTb02Ybb1d_BFI_vfGJ4f4x_eASgLVuwU1mXeMfcOx3a6V-YzkxLY_hKnuXqkculJVHBjLFZGt3rqE3GZkQBbGMAhgkiHGrUDpVrxaTynQB1YQcghJB-VSc3l7-G7kFVM0FqtAfxXfq4d5xz4NGjweA-XbvaSTktz3t8jmLQ73Q1Q-28ReGd3qchYA20c9YQBY8LhGoSRSI0tNX2IuVPio7cuWXeJptX-kLvo7DPd&c=oX-3atWz86lyH6_j8k7dns_JQ5IBLQWttaxSO-lmQlMmfGnH0Et8Hg==&ch=nLZZ9WUQiebmMwmiNeaUuLFoEdHXo7RpNAg1-WZ438mdfFIK43wZzQ==) **[**Stand with Israel**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eehVzip4bU6pB2ZFBAkvN-1JjvXlmcUHPSTkvKlKNEpE7alQzbhs0L7DegKf8JmPNctCFjzUTntURJwBOl2L6B-8rdorRziuhCbYRgW9ZOWCqMnhzIp8fgHqvkul_hoGzndhQ1KRXqXQ55F-DpgRcBzlTb02Ybb1d_BFI_vfGJ4f4x_eASgLVuwU1mXeMfcOx3a6V-YzkxLY_hKnuXqkculJVHBjLFZGt3rqE3GZkQBbGMAhgkiHGrUDpVrxaTynQB1YQcghJB-VSc3l7-G7kFVM0FqtAfxXfq4d5xz4NGjweA-XbvaSTktz3t8jmLQ73Q1Q-28ReGd3qchYA20c9YQBY8LhGoSRSI0tNX2IuVPio7cuWXeJptX-kLvo7DPd&c=oX-3atWz86lyH6_j8k7dns_JQ5IBLQWttaxSO-lmQlMmfGnH0Et8Hg==&ch=nLZZ9WUQiebmMwmiNeaUuLFoEdHXo7RpNAg1-WZ438mdfFIK43wZzQ==)**

body:
Be the first to sign President Trump's card
Friend,

President Trump's birthday is coming up!

We've identified you as someone President Trump knows he can count on to support his state allies, which is why you're the first to get access to sign his official Birthday Card.
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nck5NjifqPW_8v-FTfdZbfK5wfxmCSfwZWgjb6atGPre88Z_foJylvtTScpbTfkAbcSxU9VCKno0oTqnzzXOCpHG_RyyGumyBYLuwrJ7lFRr7ulM6k7OxKWip6MBzgvhKEG0o-k-yEUmPcVQdSsWsK_uUOdR58gjySrSVxBwGmonZbdh5SMOjF-A1PRuravg6M7Kfx1ZO4HreW03gNVHBCXVqv6WbpYtkPPS57V3pw42_5ncnDBUSpjRC-OQcyyPvEG3O0t5su-No1rQsmgJr5xdUHpiexh9Q70m5wzp5JPXUBaHQW6hOVmaneTRr5OD3SmU6okVbevRFKtYEYo8tD_YyWWcps4RaabQcPNMp9zViTkD6lBE86eeDSSxfAKGtrtkd2VURZQhLIrjSe30Bg==&c=HEiSHQHgQpkG0AIFtzMXdjrgQktPjcJ11tbWcWNv4vAfxuZfPH5PzA==&ch=iSThEnFHr1IqKG0WgmjlWQdymiQRUwH1ZU6iJptLgZsX2K7qu6ry3A==)

name: Greg Abbott
subject: I want to know your thoughts on the border crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
As you know, due to President Biden's open-border policies we're witnessing drugs, gang members, cartels, and human traffickers import crime into our country.

| | Visit [here](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9706535/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk3MDY1MzU%3d&x=5113f202) to unsubscribe.
Dear friend,

I'm reaching out today because I want to get your thoughts on the worsening crisis at our southern border. That is why I deployed state resources and law enforcement to secure the border, crack down on these dangerous criminals, and keep Texans safe.

As you know, friend, due to President Biden's open-border policies we're witnessing drugs, gang members, cartels, and human traffickers import crime into our country.

It's absolutely shameful that this is happening, and it's despicable that the Biden Administration refuses to take any action on this urgent matter.

Friend, I've been to the border multiple times, so I've seen firsthand just how bad things really are, and we need to hold President Biden accountable if we're ever going to start getting this crisis under control.

**_[That being said, I want to know how you think the President is handling this crisis.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9706535/224717773/200663/2/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=a84108fa "That being said, I want to know how you think the President is handling this crisis.")_**
**[Do you approve of how President Biden is handling the crisis, friend?](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9706535/224717773/200663/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=c0f03b91 "Do you approve of how President Biden is handling the crisis, \[=v\(@sFirstName\)=\]?")

[YES](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9706535/224717773/200663/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=2a299e43 "YES")

OR

[NO](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9706535/224717773/200663/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=4a103373 "NO")**
Thank you for sharing your thoughts,

Governor Greg Abbott
---

---
| POLITICAL AD PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
PO BOX 308, AUSTIN, TEXAS 78767
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: Press Release - Joe Kent Announces Opposition to Vaccinating Children Without Parental Consent
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Joe Kent for Congress_
body:
Latest Press Release from Joe Kent | | | |
---
| | | **DATE: May 19, 2021**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Byron Sanford ** **Cell: 360.210.6943**
[**byron@joekentforcongress.com**](mailto:byron@joekentforcongress.com)
---
|
####
# **Joe Kent Announces Opposition to Vaccinating Children Without Parental Consent**

---
| In response to concerns that school districts in Washington and elsewhere may vaccinate minor children without parental consent, Joe Kent made the following statement:

Parental authority is sacred and must not be pushed aside to inject experimental COVID vaccines into a child behind a parent’s back. The decision of whether to vaccinate a minor must lie entirely with the child’s parents.

We have witnessed the government bypassing parental consent for medical procedures on minors, including for abortions, right here in Washington State in King County.

I’m a parent of two young children myself, and I stand with parents of the Third Congressional District, the state of Washington, and all across the country demanding no minor child is given an experimental drug without his or her parent’s explicit consent.

Joe Kent is available for interviews. If interested, please email Byron Sanford at byron@joekentforcongress.com or via cell at 360.210.6943.
###
---
|
---
| [Click Here to view PDF of Joe Kent's Statement on 19May2021](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=37015c5e7c&e=00856e661d)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Why do we let them burn it down?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
So sick of the thugs |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=40c8c4d207&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=96000eb051&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, held by a Dem career politician I almost beat last year!**

Governor DeSantis has led on so many issues where other lesser politicians have failed us. From opening Florida, to fighting Big Tech, to combatting Critical Race Theory, he has made sure Florida has led the way.

I have to say, as a Floridian, I am proud and impressed. **_This is a rare and special Governor!_**

Recently, he led again- by enacting laws to punish and deter violent rioters, like those that have destroyed Portland, Seattle, LA, New York, Kenosha, and many other cities.

_Gov. Ron DeSantis on Monday signed into law Florida’s "anti-riot" bill, which increases penalties for crimes committed during riots and is aimed at "combating public disorder."

"If you look at the breadth of this particular piece of legislation, it is _the strongest anti-rioting, pro-law enforcement piece of legislation in the country_ ," DeSantis said at a press conference. "There’s just nothing even close."

The law, which goes into effect immediately, grants civil legal immunity to people who drive through protesters blocking a road and allows authorities to hold arrested demonstrators from posting bail until after their first court date. The legislation _increases the charge for battery on a police officer during a riot_ and adds language that could _force local governments to justify a reduction in law enforcement budgets_.

The bill allows people to _sue local governments over personal or property damages_ if they were determined to have interfered with law enforcement response during civil unrest. It also increases penalties for protesters who block roadways or deface public monuments and creates a new crime, "mob intimidation."

Republicans say the bill would protect law enforcement officers and help prevent public disorder following recent unrest in the U.S._

WOW. So this is what this legislation does:

---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=913cc6f7a7&e=afa21b7626)
---
| There is only one way to stop the aggressive destruction of our cities and terrorizing of our innocent citizens: punish those responsible.

In many ways, these violent rioters are more like domestic terrorists. Similar violent Maoists needed to be put down harshly all over the world; it's time we recognized what these people are and who WE are.

Americans don't become Marxists. We FIGHT Marxists.

Every single day, more of our freedoms are getting taken by the woke crazies of the Biden Administration and their Antifa street army.

**Florida is fighting these Commie thugs. America should as well. I will support companion legislation at a Federal level, punishing these extremists who hate America.**

_Governor DeSantis of Florida is fighting them all- and with incredible efficiency._

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. _Now I'm back because America needs saving more than ever! I can beat him, I'm starting early, but I need you beside me!_

If you're like me, you value your freedom. If you're like me, you want to fight for it! [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=283aae8aa9&e=afa21b7626)

[Can you join me in bringing Florida's successful legislation to Congress?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=eb84dde4ef&e=afa21b7626)

The reality is clear - we need control of Congress. [Help me restore our freedoms and protect our innocent citizens from Communism!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ba3aaa4065&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=09d551340e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2882d21da6&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=de0d5a648e&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=0907584a4a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=0907584a4a).

body:
---

| | | Peter,

When the **violent Leftist mob** came for **MY house** and **MY family** , my wife Patricia and I **grabbed our guns, stood our ground, and refused to give them _one damn inch. _**

for U.S. Senate here in Missouri")_**... because I **KNOW** that defeating the radical, anti-American Left is the biggest battle for the future of freedom.

My campaign will be **powered by conservative patriots like you** ... _not_ the Republican Establishment. **_[I'm counting on YOU to make sure we have a fighting chance.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57432717:JFyC1LlNu:m:1:3206719985:588DBA2FD56993DBE515ECDFD0384975:r "I’m
counting on YOU to make sure we have a fighting chance.")_**

| | | [DONATE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57432717:JFyC1LlNu:m:1:3206719985:588DBA2FD56993DBE515ECDFD0384975:r)

| | | [DONATE WHAT YOU CAN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57432720:JFyC1LlNu:m:1:3206719985:588DBA2FD56993DBE515ECDFD0384975:r)
---
| Like you, I was **horrified by the urban violence and race riots** that erupted across the nation last June... but **I never dreamed the mob would wind up on _my doorstep_** _._

With rioters swarming into our yard, Patricia and I did what most Americans would do: **we grabbed our firearms, and stood at the ready to defend our home.**

**We stopped the Leftist mob that day.**

But even though we _never even fired a shot_ , a **Leftist activist prosecutor** in St. Louis decided to **make an example** by filing charges against _us._(A judge later shut her down for **" initiating criminal prosecution for political purposes."**)

It was so egregious that **even President Trump called the charges against us "disgraceful"** and generously **gave us a platform to speak at the RNC** last summer.

**I put everything on the line** ... my home, my law career, my freedom... because I learned something important that day:
**Our nation is under attack from within**... and **America will NOT survive** _unless_ conservatives join together to defeat the lawless, violent thugs on the far-Left
Next November,** I will bring that fighting spirit to Washington.** **_[But I can't finish this fight and save our country without your immediate support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57432717:JFyC1LlNu:m:1:3206719985:588DBA2FD56993DBE515ECDFD0384975:r "But I can’t finish this fight and save our country without your immediate support.")_**

with me... by pitching in $25 to fuel this campaign?")_**

Mark McCloskey

subject: President Trump is going to ask me, Peter…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
I don’t want to let him down.
| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, It’s me: NCGOP Chairman Michael Whatley. When President Trump walks off the stage next month in North Carolina, he’s going to ask me who stepped up to support him and who sat on the sidelines. **[What should I tell him about you?](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw92f2Ca1sL5Au2dX_hEE6iUIOlB3wdgKKDPaI1TsBqvkSZGVBUa-zatcf7He-NQLD0GwU8NtsurC0sD7GyBpjCSwUHwSALoIwpzvQztclkE_AqPYdGJ0aUl2R2Pq_M3ISLO6XzXZMYLvI2Iv8lThrKBv4IQOvVXx5sh64-B57KQRvKslOEXij5886vuIWd9CwBgg-2Fr5Lo_auxAG3WUCOcUaj8EUDzEwO4CtupQlYOSPr4IWIlmL3QiwdN2OZrEboikplcRvnBxoMG_jAAMDjKQ&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=212754008034413812_p&n=1)** _The fact is that President Trump is**BACK** , and he’s rallying America First Republicans to his side. name: James Hartnett
subject: Fwd: quick update!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
After talking with Stewart yesterday, I knew I needed to reach back out. We’ve got some big plans laid to get Stewart’s message out there but we’re going to need a little bit more money than we initially realized.
I’m writing this as I’m taking my lunch break, but we want to push our number of donations up to 200 before tonight! I know we can do this and if we do, we’ll have the resources to keep releasing new ads to voters. If you can chip in any amount right now it would be a huge help. Use this link to help us out: http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email]
Thanks in advance for your support!
-- James
-- Begin Original Message --
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email]Hey Peter!
Thank you all so much for everything you’re doing to support Stewart! I wanted to reach out to give you an update on how things are going with the campaign since our last goal.
The short is: we’re picking up a lot of steam as more and more folks get to know Stewart and hear about his priorities in Congress. For the past month, we’ve been running a series of introductory ads with voters across the district.
On the agenda this week is to figure out how we can close the gap to keep running digital ads. We made up a lot of ground this weekend, but we’re still a bit behind on our May fundraising projections.
So, I wanted to ask quickly if I can count on you to chip in $10 to Stewart’s campaign today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email&amount=10]
We all know that Stewart’s laser-focused on improving access to healthcare while driving down costs, finally laying the last mile of high speed broadband, and cleaning up our rivers and the Chesapeake Bay. But we need to keep getting the word out.
So I’m asking for 100 donations before tomorrow night! Whatever you can give would be greatly appreciated! You can chip in using this link I’ll leave for you here: http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210519-email]
Thanks everyone,
James Hartnett
Finance Director
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

name: John Burke
subject: How do YOU feel about your taxes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
We want to know how you feel about the taxes you pay in California. Read more >>
Peter, Last week, Kevin announced his tax plan to ensure a California Comeback! It’s safe to say that California is FAILING when it comes to taxes. We have some of the highest income and gas taxes in the nation. And for what? California has the highest supplemental poverty rate! California has become too expensive for families and small businesses. One-party rule is failing Californians and we need to bring commonsense back to the Golden State. **That’s why Kevin has a PLAN to fix California’s broken economy. Under his plan, individuals would receive their first $50,000 in income tax-free and couples would get their first $100,000 in income tax-free.** _That is nearly $2,000 for individuals, and $4,000 for couples per year._ **We want to know how you feel about the taxes you pay in California, Peter**. Are they too high? Just right? Could you be paying more? Let us know by clicking the button that best describes your feelings: [**I DON'T PAY ENOUGH >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6e5a90dd6b66ed19/7971e18477cb3148c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**I PAY JUST THE RIGHT AMOUNT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6e5a90dd6b66ed19/4248b3426987ab79c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**I PAY TOO MUCH >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6e5a90dd6b66ed19/a4b76b5b514d5305c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**I'M CONSIDERING LEAVING BECAUSE I CAN'T AFFORD THE TAXES ANYMORE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6e5a90dd6b66ed19/b73d256ce8728917c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Please let us know how California taxes have been affecting you! Thanks for your response,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6e5a90dd6b66ed19/207084fa5df8f316c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6e5a90dd6b66ed19/836d9f23265f38bac3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6e5a90dd6b66ed19/04c62676dcb48f69c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6e5a90dd6b66ed19/16f4c0ffd0571f10c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Greg Abbott
subject: I want to know your thoughts on the border crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
| | Dear Friend,

I'm reaching out today because I want to get your thoughts on the worsening crisis at our southern border. That is why I deployed state resources and law enforcement to secure the border, crack down on these dangerous criminals, and keep Texans safe.

As you know, Friend, due to President Biden's open-border policies we're witnessing drugs, gang members, cartels, and human traffickers import crime into our country.

It's absolutely shameful that this is happening, and it's despicable that the Biden Administration refuses to take any action on this urgent matter.

Friend, I've been to the border multiple times, so I've seen firsthand just how bad things really are, and we need to hold President Biden accountable if we're ever going to start getting this crisis under control.

| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots taking Swampy scalps, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=64a3f49fe0&e=ba6e67b849)!

**Good news: We took a scalp! Never Trumper Liz Cheney was voted out of leadership this week - and is polling at 13% for re-election in Wyoming. Politically, the fat lady is singing for Liz Cheney.**

It is so crucial that we stand with the GOOD Republicans and support them! This week, Marjorie Taylor Greene came under attack from AOC, just for wanting to debate her over the Green New Deal:

_Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.) took a swipe at Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) on Thursday, likening her to the “kinds of people that I threw out of bars” after the Georgia Republican aggressively confronted her outside the House chamber the day before._

_After Ocasio-Cortez’s departure, Greene also reportedly called the Democrat a “radical socialist” and a “chicken” who “doesn’t want to debate the Green New Deal.”

The report came after Greene challenged Ocasio-Cortez to a debate over her "Green New Deal" legislation. Not long after, Greene also went up to Ocasio-Cortez in the House chamber and posted a photo of the moment on social media. _

AOC has possibly done more damage to our country than any individual in 50 years. Yet she and the DC press corps are blaming Marjorie Taylor Greene for wanting to debate the issues.

_Debating issues. Remember when we expected politicians to do that?_

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: We need to defend every Democratic Senate incumbent, including Senator Patty Murray
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Anyone who knows anything about Washington State knows about my friend, Senator Patty Murray. A role model for all of us, Patty Murray has been a fierce leader for women and working families ever since she was elected as the first female Senator to represent our great state.

It's an honor to serve alongside Senator Murray in the other Washington. Although we work in separate chambers of Congress, we've gotten bicameral legislation written and passed together to protect our environment and expand economic opportunity.

In the years I've worked alongside our senator, I've gotten to know her as a strong advocate and dedicated public servant. **Simply put -- Patty Murray gets things done. Now, this incredible for-the-people champion is up for re-election, and I 'm asking you to join us:

[Will you split a contribution between Senator Patty Murray's campaign and ours to ensure she has the resources she needs to win re-election?](https://act.myngp.com/el/LWLeUAiStGaoBsWiveVRI0LUA_mPoTvTJNapX0anybo=/0t7OHREwPM_WROFL8YQ4cEWlPKqVwb2ViIZICkB6X18=?gpsid=50_115_18955&refcode=em21_210519_Patty_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210519_Patty_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Peter, I know I talk a lot about defending the House majority, but the truth is the Senate majority is on the line next year too. With Republicans only **ONE seat** away from regaining control, we cannot afford to lose a single Senate seat. We need to take every race seriously and defend every Democratic incumbent, including Patty Murray.

Senator Murray has been working day and night to support working families, strengthen our economy, stand up for patients' health care, raise the minimum wage, expand paid leave policies, protect workers' rights, and more. That's why we need to work overtime to have her back in the days ahead.

**[Patty Murray and I are counting on supporters like you to help us keep her seat -- and the Senate majority -- blue. Will you rush an urgent split donation of $5, or whatever you can, to our campaigns today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/LWLeUAiStGaoBsWiveVRI0LUA_mPoTvTJNapX0anybo=/0t7OHREwPM_WROFL8YQ4cEWlPKqVwb2ViIZICkB6X18=?gpsid=50_115_18955&refcode=em21_210519_Patty_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210519_Patty_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/LWLeUAiStGaoBsWiveVRI0LUA_mPoTvTJNapX0anybo=/0t7OHREwPM_WROFL8YQ4cEWlPKqVwb2ViIZICkB6X18=?gpsid=50_115_18955&refcode=em21_210519_Patty_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210519_Patty_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Outside spending is off the charts already in Arizona!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**FIRST:** A major National Republican and Trump donor announced he is running against Mark. He spent $337,896 on TV ads 18 months before the election.
**THEN:** The National Republican Senatorial Committee stepped in and launched tens of thousands of dollars in ads of their own to try and defeat us in 2022.
**NOW:** One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona attacking Mark. It’s the latest sign that National Republicans are willing to spend whatever it takes to take back this seat.
Our campaign is being hit from all angles. We know this is just the beginning and that this is a signal more attack ads are coming.
So we’re working around the clock to prepare for whatever gets thrown our way next. Because if we’re in this together, we’re going to have Mark’s back and hold this seat.
[**So if you are able, will you make a $5 contribution to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to defend Mark and hold this seat in 2022.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210519-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=641_6688874_-uEQyB&akid=641%2E6688874%2E-uEQyB)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210519-1-subs&t=6&refcode2=641_6688874_-uEQyB&akid=641%2E6688874%2E-uEQyB) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210519-1-subs&t=7&refcode2=641_6688874_-uEQyB&akid=641%2E6688874%2E-uEQyB)

We have a chance to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate for a full six-year term if lots and lots of people chip in what they can when they can.
Your support will help us fight back against the attacks, set the record straight, and continue to run a campaign focused on improving people’s lives.
Thank you for having Mark’s back.
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210519-1-subs&t=8&refcode2=641_6688874_-uEQyB&akid=641%2E6688874%2E-uEQyB)**

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter, I just got to Mesa, Arizona with Marjorie Taylor Greene, and we have one thing in mind: fighting for election integrity in Arizona and standing up to the mainstream media who want to shut down the 2020 election audit. We are bringing the America First Rally Tour to Arizona because they have been brave enough to demand secure and transparent elections by ordering a forensic audit. We're here to support them, | | | | The media, Big Tech, Big Business, basically everyone under the sun is up against us. Marjorie and I have targets on our backs because of what we believe, and because we are not afraid to stand and fight for the Silent Majority. Marjorie was silenced and stripped of her committee assignments by House Democrats. I was targeted by CNN with a propaganda campaign that they admitted to on tape. Will you pitch in to help Marjorie Taylor Greene and I spread the America First message across the country? | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for standing with us, | | Matt Gaetz | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2021 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Drew, Me (2)
subject: Re: we need to keep going
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY LATTA FOR CONGRESS
body:
I know you're busy and I hate to be a bother, so I'll make this quick.
Hello, Friend,

I know you're busy and I hate to be a bother, so I'll make this quick.

There is an important battleground district in New Mexico with a special election coming up in a few weeks. Helping Conservatives win this House seat could determine the fate of Nancy Pelosi's hold over the Speaker's Gavel.

name: Team Gallagher
subject: China will pull ahead if we keep doing this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:
China is rapidly closing the technology gap after decades of intellectual property theft, industrial espionage, and cutting corners [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=380190ed1ad04c9684f8968c1a25e59a&_e=ceoQlD2BpsB2RQvlcUp2V-_FuUcTtJIRBCWya5kJCm_4rA7SDIb07T4YDYSjS9RmgURt2oggNzB7TV_qMUd9WF7NHqAqAPM72TqAbRFNHpBEWct4YxGQbIsj_LKCaOsW-Hcm_Q54i5F5yOSuyxMfmGMeXGUE-kQUtCM9Tbs_xVQVFskNRoYpsGEDeQ-3KmJ9LdggbFNBrw5nML-Z2HeI4-DyaEOs9XSgRPv9vvIQ93eP1uRlbI2NcR4FYMZSAZA9Y7LuVSu_6YZ-4S-uvikAxzyeAAnq1l-znSu-IhVSQZTOlVUKY8CeD8u2mw4dd49p4zmr2AyswLrxhwqulE6N2iFqifdelxyapOIvx132GP88Eb9SW_iwl8R2tQcX41y93jlbmtqhfzWOJheYtq2DJserEd3dlc6hbWoEhnaqUD3JKQ1BvaRwnOSahtM_1mOubfCcofDkykC87v7neu4Z6VrBSeEEJbacw5PIArCxjcgsApSL5gFpVEpuOYxE4uFO) Peter, For decades America has led the world in science and technology –– and the world is a better place because of it. **But now that status is being challenged.** China is rapidly closing the technology gap after decades of intellectual property theft, industrial espionage, and cutting corners wherever they can. President Xi doesn’t believe in accountability and transparency and there’s not much he won’t do to fuel China’s rise –– even if it means committing genocide against Uighurs, covering up the origins of the coronavirus outbreak, or squashing democracy in Hong Kong. **China’s rise threatens our national security, economic competitiveness, and our way of life, and we need to respond to this challenge the same way we did at the start of the Cold War.** | |
---
[](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=380190ed1ad04c9684f8968c1a25e59a&_e=ceoQlD2BpsB2RQvlcUp2V-_FuUcTtJIRBCWya5kJCm_4rA7SDIb07T4YDYSjS9RmgURt2oggNzB7TV_qMUd9WF7NHqAqAPM72TqAbRFNHpBEWct4YxGQbIsj_LKCaOsW-Hcm_Q54i5F5yOSuyxMfmGMeXGUE-kQUtCM9Tbs_xVQVFskNRoYpsGEDeQ-3KmJ9LdggbFNBrw5nML-Z2HeI4-DyaEOs9XSgRPv9vvIQ93eP1uRlbI2NcR4FYMZSAZA9Y7LuVSu_6YZ-4S-uvikAxzyeAAnq1l-znSu-IhVSQZRkf-joK3KAbGLVT3sD_SnQ0_Qkgxj1NeaAtvtaEVopTlM-ntOVEzMM1JyvXkqtqVxT9PwpJDuaXWk-Aflt2I4m5LIzyZIic6Q_grU8CQCble6lvNCwzUvq-otkImP6S0154xZcYjs1TBzQwFNFCt9OPaYrb3UOHgX7YN8O-IT58XIRePlYtQ4hok1A4UaupFqB75xf3Hsoeod9AufiiPCK)
[**Stand with Mike**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=380190ed1ad04c9684f8968c1a25e59a&_e=ceoQlD2BpsB2RQvlcUp2V-_FuUcTtJIRBCWya5kJCm_4rA7SDIb07T4YDYSjS9RmgURt2oggNzB7TV_qMUd9WF7NHqAqAPM72TqAbRFNHpBEWct4YxGQbIsj_LKCaOsW-Hcm_Q54i5F5yOSuyxMfmGMeXGUE-kQUtCM9Tbs_xVQVFskNRoYpsGEDeQ-3KmJ9LdggbFNBrw5nML-Z2HeI4-DyaEOs9XSgRPv9vvIQ93eP1uRlbI2NcR4FYMZSAZA9Y7LuVSu_6YZ-4S-uvikAxzyeAAnq1l-znSu-IhVSQZQDkob34rZUbR-2nsh48J-onr6VjAA9HlEq3E1BLYqvVqtZBJMuK1eiCacstDv6VDIA-1gViOhV-nNR4mO2SYdMYSY87qg0XfmajuGgdM338P1a7hJSPVD_4tsMK4a3fJIGje_ZccyF6K4IGhQc8UEFtOevNm9hLgzhKBPHI3It02tGWHWuV8BB6gyuw7Zkq0GvflUE2jTqqV5HGluisvuI)
American companies will have no chance competing against their Chinese counterparts if Democrat leadership keeps burdening them with taxes and regulations. If we keep following this strategy, it will only be a matter of time before China pulls ahead in the technology race.

That’s the last thing we can afford.

**_That’s why Mike is leading the fight in Congress to:_**
* Bring supply chains back to American soil
* Cut taxes and slash regulations
* Invest in manufacturing, research, and technologies of tomorrow
* Hold the Chinese Communist Party accountable

**Peter, stand with Mike as he fights to keep America ahead in the technology race by adding your name:[https://secure.winred.com/mikegallagher/leadership-151144/](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=380190ed1ad04c9684f8968c1a25e59a&_e=ceoQlD2BpsB2RQvlcUp2V-_FuUcTtJIRBCWya5kJCm_4rA7SDIb07T4YDYSjS9RmgURt2oggNzB7TV_qMUd9WF7NHqAqAPM72TqAbRFNHpBEWct4YxGQbIsj_LKCaOsW-Hcm_Q54i5F5yOSuyxMfmGMeXGUE-kQUtCM9Tbs_xVQVFskNRoYpsGEDeQ-3KmJ9LdggbFNBrw5nML-Z2HeI4-DyaEOs9XSgRPv9vvIQ93eP1uRlbI2NcR4FYMZSAZA9Y7LuVSu_6YZ-4S-uvikAxzyeAAnq1l-znSu-IhVSQZTJGAi6qCUaVi9bA7YtQUBoeDtKv72dIhtt5WQMUpyP81hz-hm6ADyYQJtLmLfB4CcjHm7iN8aTMqf1f1S_TVljHLXy9cmvfa-mMuH4iQpi2mBX4Iny5oQSvj_bmBVh6FopAQQJEZewzumBlx05vypKiluycWe-n35wSSEPBOlSI8ju-jwN0P3_d77epe04NOup-YD-JZwNVoQJS5F0oFJ6)**
