clean_body: China is rapidly closing the technology gap after decades of intellectual property theft, industrial espionage, and cutting corners Peter, For decades America has led the world in science and technology –– and the world is a better place because of it. But now that status is being challenged. China is rapidly closing the technology gap after decades of intellectual property theft, industrial espionage, and cutting corners wherever they can. President Xi doesn’t believe in accountability and transparency and there’s not much he won’t do to fuel China’s rise –– even if it means committing genocide against Uighurs, covering up the origins of the coronavirus outbreak, or squashing democracy in Hong Kong. China’s rise threatens our national security, economic competitiveness, and our way of life, and we need to respond to this challenge the same way we did at the start of the Cold War. | | American companies will have no chance competing against their Chinese counterparts if Democrat leadership keeps burdening them with taxes and regulations. If we keep following this strategy, it will only be a matter of time before China pulls ahead in the technology race. That’s the last thing we can afford. That’s why Mike is leading the fight in Congress to: Bring supply chains back to American soil Cut taxes and slash regulations Invest in manufacturing, research, and technologies of tomorrow Hold the Chinese Communist Party accountable Peter, stand with Mike as he fights to keep America ahead in the technology race by adding your name: Thank you, Team Gallagher | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Team Franchot
subject: Underwater
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
If we don’t do anything to curb carbon emissions and protect our environment, the effects of climate change will be catastrophic -- especially for America’s coastal cities.
According to the Baltimore Sun, a harrowing 2018 report from the University of Maryland Center for Environmental Science predicted that places like Baltimore’s Inner Harbor and Annapolis’ City Dock could see near-daily flooding by the end of the century due to climate change.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/combatclimatechange?refcode=active&amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/combatclimatechange?refcode=active&amount=20.22]If we want to avoid the worst-case climate scenario for our state, our leaders need to act fast. Peter Franchot understands that the actions taken today will have enormous consequences for tomorrow -- which is why he is committed to making Maryland the first net zero state in the nation.
On Day 1, he’ll sign an executive order requiring all energy consumed by the state government to be created by 100% renewable energy where possible, with a mandate for full conversion by the end of his first term. He will also convert the entire fleet of state vehicles to electric, and he’ll prioritize carbon capture technologies to lower state emissions.
We’re incredibly excited about this bold vision for a greener Maryland future. But here’s the hard truth. In order to get there, we first need to win this election.
Our people-powered campaign relies on grassroots supporters like you to keep us going. Will you chip in what you can to help make our vision for a net zero future a reality?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/combatclimatechange?refcode=active&amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/combatclimatechange?refcode=active&amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/combatclimatechange?refcode=active&amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/combatclimatechange?refcode=active&amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/combatclimatechange?refcode=active]By chipping in, you can help us spread the message to other Maryland voters about Peter’s bold plans for Maryland’s future. Your contribution will help pay for more yard signs, field literature, magnets and stickers, future field offices, and other vital tools that will help us get the word out about the need to combat climate change, and so much more.
Peter Franchot is an unprecedented candidate for these unprecedented times. He has a long record of delivering results for Maryland’s small businesses and working families. He has an expertise on the state’s budget -- a must-have skill for Maryland’s next Governor -- that cannot be learned on the job. And he has the big ideas and bold solutions that we need to respond to the urgency of this historic moment.
With your help, we can win this election, make the quick progress we need to tackle climate change, and ensure that future generations can inherit a livable, healthy planet.
Thank you for your support,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/combatclimatechange?refcode=active&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1a28d077-aeb8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed/58d1dae3-deb8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGQxZGFlMy1kZWI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b33GxVBaeclPF6I2pYBoyabCcqHQdUCZ-srIUZuCuGk=&id=136194660 .

Governor Reynolds has just signed a sweeping charter school bill that is putting power back in the hands of parents when it comes to their child's education! _This legislation will create new options for K-12 education that ensure that no student will be trapped in a failing school._

While Joe Biden is playing politics and letting the Teacher's Union Bosses dictate education policy, Kim is putting power in the hands of students and parents. == **== It's time to ensure that families have the freedom to choose where they want to send their children for their education. == Governor Reynolds has not wavered from her commitment to #PutStudentsFirst. Will you stand with her? Thank you, Team Reynolds Get involved with Team Reynolds Today! name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Welcome to the Eternal Vigilance Project – you’re in!
body:
| |
---
I know that everything seems really crazy right now, but I’m really excited to introduce you to a new program that will allow you to take small actions locally to make a huge difference in your community and in our country.

Allow me to introduce the **Eternal Vigilance Project!** Under the umbrella of the Eternal Vigilance Project, Tea Party Patriots Action will provide resources, training, and opportunities for you and other patriots to **keep the republic.**

That’s your goal, right? Ours too. It’s as simple as that – we must keep the republic.

For now, the first action we must take with the Eternal Vigilance Project is to recruit two levels of volunteers. I’ve listed them both below, and I am asking you to search your heart, pray about your involvement, and to sign up for one of these volunteer positions.

Each level contains specific commitments and goals that are necessary for you and I to keep the republic. You will see that Champion of the Republic encompasses a larger number of these commitments/goals than does Keeper of the Republic. Pick the position that best fits your availability and abilities.

Let us know if you have any questions, and please sign up as a [**Keeper of the Republic**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTM5LWRlMjBmNmE4ZTY1MzQxN2U5MGM5ZGNhYzVjODg3Mjk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMva2VlcGVyLW9mLXRoZS1yZXB1YmxpYy8_bWlkPTQzODAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=JlWITBsEi8kk6WFN_Y8Z1Q) or a [**Champion of the Republic**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTM5LWRlMjBmNmE4ZTY1MzQxN2U5MGM5ZGNhYzVjODg3Mjk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvY2hhbXBpb24tb2YtdGhlLXJlcHVibGljLz9taWQ9NDM4MDImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=93iU8ibssLjYSVUvNJnEsA) – and be sure to share these application links with likeminded people you believe would be assets to this movement.
**KEEPER OF THE REPUBLIC**
Keeper of the Republic will organize at a very local level, communicating TPPA’s message of liberty to friends, family, and neighbors. **[Apply here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTM5LWRlMjBmNmE4ZTY1MzQxN2U5MGM5ZGNhYzVjODg3Mjk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMva2VlcGVyLW9mLXRoZS1yZXB1YmxpYy8_bWlkPTQzODAyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Gxba5m1PCj_seM1R_Iz7tQ)**

**Goals to achieve by November 2022 include:**
* Host 1 House Party

clean_body: | | I know that everything seems really crazy right now, but I’m really excited to introduce you to a new program that will allow you to take small actions locally to make a huge difference in your community and in our country. Allow me to introduce the Eternal Vigilance Project! Under the umbrella of the Eternal Vigilance Project, Tea Party Patriots Action will provide resources, training, and opportunities for you and other patriots to keep the republic. That’s your goal, right? Ours too. It’s as simple as that – we must keep the republic. For now, the first action we must take with the Eternal Vigilance Project is to recruit two levels of volunteers. I’ve listed them both below, and I am asking you to search your heart, pray about your involvement, and to sign up for one of these volunteer positions. Each level contains specific commitments and goals that are necessary for you and I to keep the republic. You will see that Champion of the Republic encompasses a larger number of these commitments/goals than does Keeper of the Republic. Pick the position that best fits your availability and abilities. Let us know if you have any questions, and please sign up as a or a – and be sure to share these application links with likeminded people you believe would be assets to this movement. KEEPER OF THE REPUBLIC Keeper of the Republic will organize at a very local level, communicating TPPA’s message of liberty to friends, family, and neighbors. | Patriot,
The economic recovery in the aftermath of the pandemic is not going well for the Biden Administration. These benefit extensions are leaving unemployed individuals hesitant to return to work.

| | Derek,

We thought (and hoped) Donald Trump-backed Corey Stewart was done after Tim Kaine and Virginia voters handed him a resounding defeat in the 2018 Virginia Senate race.

But he’s back, this time as a key endorser for Glenn Youngkin, the Trump-endorsed Republican candidate for Governor of Virginia.

**Derek, we came together and stopped Corey Stewart from bringing Trumpism to our Commonwealth. Now we need to work just as hard to stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin from buying our governor’s office.**

**[Can you donate now and help Terry defeat Glenn Youngkin and protect Virginia’s progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29434975/286397031/-2023814932?refcode=20210519_TVA_5BC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGY4MGIxNS1lYWI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CMc473r9GjdHFURbVN3rn9LrCchFDiuT3587DKNEax4=)**

When it comes to Donald Trump, Glenn Youngkin and Corey Stewart have a ton in common.

But here’s what makes Glenn different:

Youngkin is mega-rich. He already used his vast fortune to buy himself the Republican nomination. Now he’s promising to spend $75 million of his own money to buy the Governor’s office for him and Donald Trump.

**Virginia Democrats won’t win without a massive grassroots team that’s strong enough to go toe-to-toe with Youngkin. If we fail, he’ll outspend us in every corner of the Commonwealth and roll back all the progress we’ve fought so hard for over in Virginia.**

**[Will you contribute now and join Terry in fighting for Virginia’s future?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29434976/286397032/-2023814932?refcode=20210519_TVA_5BC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGY4MGIxNS1lYWI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CMc473r9GjdHFURbVN3rn9LrCchFDiuT3587DKNEax4=)**

We fought too hard to stop guys like Corey Stewart and Donald Trump to let Glenn Youngkin take us back.

Thanks,

\-- Team Terry | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29434977/286397033/-2023814932?refcode=20210519_TVA_5BC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGY4MGIxNS1lYWI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CMc473r9GjdHFURbVN3rn9LrCchFDiuT3587DKNEax4=)

body:
This is just crazy and shows how far the Democrat Party has fallen.

Patriot,

This is just crazy and shows how far the Democrat Party has fallen.

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/auysQNkoGo0zEf4Ec6YcPw/OXwt0VvxHouu0763kOfC3DGg) As Hamas was bombing Israel, AOC, Ilhan Omar and the rest of the "Hamas Caucus" were attacking Joe Biden for "allowing" Israel to protect itself.

AOC tweeted, "If the Biden admin can't stand up to an ally, who can it stand up to?"

Another terrorist-supporting member of Congress, Ayanna Pressley stood on the house floor and literally compared Hamas terrorism to Civil Rights saying, "Palestinians are being told the same thing as Black folks in America: There is no acceptable form of resistance."

Wow.

Firing rockets into neighborhoods is not resistance, it's terrorism.

**Yet several sitting members of Congress continue to defend - AND ENCOURAGE - terrorism!**

The "Squad" demanded that Trump be impeached and they got what they wanted from the Democrat Establishment.

Now, they're back to their original mission and that's to undermine our nation and Israel by supporting terrorists.

The American public needs a national leader who is willing to stand up and tell the truth about these women. [**That 's why I'm asking for your support for my run for Congress**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/auysQNkoGo0zEf4Ec6YcPw/OXwt0VvxHouu0763kOfC3DGg). I've been banned by all major social media platforms - simply because I called Ilhan Omar "anti-Jewish" - which NO ONE disputes now, as it's VERY clear. Omar is a Jew-hater.

Omar and her Jihad Squad in Congress are working to undermine democracy and ease Americans in to accepting Sharia Law and their anti-woman, anti-gay, anti-liberty ways that would have our wives and daughters in hijabs.

[**Send me to Congress so I can fight.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/auysQNkoGo0zEf4Ec6YcPw/OXwt0VvxHouu0763kOfC3DGg)

We're making progress on our May fundraising goal but need to raise $28,923 by the end of the month. [**Will you donate today?**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/auysQNkoGo0zEf4Ec6YcPw/OXwt0VvxHouu0763kOfC3DGg)

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Team Sarah
subject: Our priorities are flipping this seat and expanding the Democratic majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Here are three things we know about the battle for the Senate majority in 2022:
1. Democrats are TIED in the Senate. Vice President Kamala Harris is the tiebreaker giving us our majority.
2. _Inside Elections_ has already called Wisconsin a **battleground race** that could determine who controls the Senate.
3. If Sarah wins, we could cement a real majority to keep making progressive change for working families.

Flipping this seat and expanding the Senate majority is possible -- but we have our work cut out for us. Taking on the tough fights isn’t new for Sarah, she's been doing it since she was a young girl running for Student Council. She took on the fight to expand voting rights while in college. She fought to save taxpayers money while working with senior military officials with the Pentagon. And she took on Scott Walker to save the State Treasurer's office -- and won.

This is Sarah's toughest fight to date, and we're counting on the support of grassroots donors to help fund this movement. And we'll be completely honest: everything from buying gas so Sarah can travel the state to meet with voters to running our digital advertising program costs money. We need to know we can count on early investments from our best supporters (that's you!) to execute our plan to win.

[**Chip in $5, or whatever you can, right now to help us flip this seat and expand the Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29436463/286402038/-382700568?gpsid=31_130_18762&refcode=em21_210519_senmaj_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210519_senmaj_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDQ0ODhhMy1lZmI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zsfD4HyQNE6TrZcXRwsJJi3FihPJPkbDGR2-xbOqhuI=)

President Biden needs your help. Take action now! | Peter- Joe Biden’s plans are changing lives. But not everyone knows that these plans ARE Joe Biden’s. **Case in point:** **68% of rural voters support stimulus checks. clean_body: President Biden needs your help. Take action now! | Peter- Joe Biden’s plans are changing lives. But not everyone knows that these plans ARE Joe Biden’s. Case in point: 68% of rural voters support stimulus checks. But 43% of those same voters DON’T associate them with Joe Biden. And 42% of rural voters DON’T associate rural broadband expansion with Joe Biden, even though his American Jobs Plan is going to invest $100 billion into the project. That’s where we come in. Unite the Country makes sure every voter knows what President Biden has accomplished for Americans. We curate digital and television content and create award-winning ads to spread Biden’s message near and far. But those poll numbers are shocking. We need to up the ante and do even more to make sure voters everywhere know about President Biden’s plan to Build Back Better. = We’re watching Joe Biden’s poll numbers closely, and we need your help to make sure we can continue to launch rapid response campaigns whenever necessary. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- = | = | = | = Thanks for your support, Unite the Country Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment. Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. = = =** Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. subject: They’re trying to flank us and I don’t want Conservatives to lose!

body:
Do not put this off.
**From the Office of the House Republican Whip**
Hello Friend,
I just got word that the biggest Liberal group in America will spend a staggering $20 million against Conservatives in battleground states like Pennsylvania and Wisconsin. **But I 'm afraid it gets much, MUCH worse. **
I'm also hearing that the group is doling out huge cash bonuses to fund Democrat voter operations specifically in Republican states like Florida and Texas!
[**They 're trying to flank us and I don't want Conservatives to lose! **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1aa9d2cb4c234974bd92b7328958b0d1&_e=QYWAs98na2GzIwFYMj-DYdJ-vWPD7u3sZlW70omFveQhrMKsQnGvRoIIigAuVQOPPbYuv5kGg8s4Ufc5EhzdPG_gq-EJtkgyjmVzVLLWJF4XISdI2IPiPxJIkLUxb5BJhtFJN3ehj4zIoVR_X3b8c2JNGTH9h3lAiE3PT4bOPrrrAiz6Y4M__GBHANsqCNtmS066-iifY2JjiXCSBz70K_qHxOcnZ8hLmJIiDlnV8k95a8bdWl_m22d6Vwoz38uYDqZRAOkr5Dei1r14rlYPYSxgnSBdJf7IZCyvAu3mgasIY1JfJGIV6Uc7XJCjgArR6HDEGPI_jmZyUxkG9XFHo9yq_zssFbBFNmKDwPSbUiH39nXTRwodv2loCX_M4f0QvCsD4uOMs1_wAZn_OUI8CvY-l7_yTCU_us2kwYmEtoT2NP_tR7pAgTemsKppV3AGCLchTj6xNhJebo9L-KUNU0SgBqAInuBIlRs_EkBA705vOIpv1aHMU0yxNVzSdka1aUoRaIxtcFNpZWXWgbf8OlRSF7Jb0LRwCXlD9kHfdfYHs-jKDoCOosuCMK_59XUHlN-P3jZLI7ajwNopOqemrQ%3D%3D)
I'm sounding the alarm. If we lose in these states, the chances of Republicans winning back control of Congress -- _and stopping Biden from changing America forever_ \-- will be reduced to ZERO.
We now have A LOT more ground to cover and our emergency reserves are running critically low.
**I knew I had to reach out to you right away.**
[**Without your immediate intervention, we may lose key battleground states AND must-win Republican ones. So with everything at stake -- will you send in critically-needed reinforcements before it 's too late to do anything about it? **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1aa9d2cb4c234974bd92b7328958b0d1&_e=QYWAs98na2GzIwFYMj-DYdJ-vWPD7u3sZlW70omFveQhrMKsQnGvRoIIigAuVQOPPbYuv5kGg8s4Ufc5EhzdPG_gq-EJtkgyjmVzVLLWJF4XISdI2IPiPxJIkLUxb5BJhtFJN3ehj4zIoVR_X3b8c2JNGTH9h3lAiE3PT4bOPrrrAiz6Y4M__GBHANsqCNtmS066-iifY2JjiXCSBz70K_qHxOcnZ8hLmJIiDlnV8k95a8bdWl_m22d6Vwoz38uYDqZRAOkr5Dei1r14rlYPYSxgnSBdJf7IZCyvAu3mgasIY1JfJGIV6Uc7XJCjgArR6HDEGPI_jmZyUxkG9XFHo9yq_zssFbBFNmKDwPSbUiH39nXTRwodv2loCX_M4f0Q22kevfYjfhoiojf5KPr39isnUNzoiZY1vjbxux1J0tEIi9o7YTfB1FES3xhAcQmXVWCMhAV7y2WFwpSu-UNM5ScAMV8eftiFWF5G9k5aF_fIO4PmarwqbfZts911Pu6ii32F51rc2Uw0suuKJfLvToFsBlc-gGQjMRUa0um_Pujxe-NGYrRqTiC99HcmV1U3A_1MInjxJCr4Ty7WdwxJpw%3D%3D)
Look, I know you're receiving a lot of emails, but I'm turning to you because this is our single best chance to stop the Liberals.
Do not put this off.
_They 're about to launch the largest swarm of attack ads in history, unleash the biggest voter turnout operations ever, and deploy field teams in 50 out of 50 states... _
**All of which to DECIMATE our chances for winning back control of Congress.**
[**I 'm asking for your help to stop them.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1aa9d2cb4c234974bd92b7328958b0d1&_e=QYWAs98na2GzIwFYMj-DYdJ-vWPD7u3sZlW70omFveQhrMKsQnGvRoIIigAuVQOPPbYuv5kGg8s4Ufc5EhzdPG_gq-EJtkgyjmVzVLLWJF4XISdI2IPiPxJIkLUxb5BJhtFJN3ehj4zIoVR_X3b8c2JNGTH9h3lAiE3PT4bOPrrrAiz6Y4M__GBHANsqCNtmS066-iifY2JjiXCSBz70K_qHxOcnZ8hLmJIiDlnV8k95a8bdWl_m22d6Vwoz38uYDqZRAOkr5Dei1r14rlYPYSxgnSBdJf7IZCyvAu3mgasIY1JfJGIV6Uc7XJCjgArR6HDEGPI_jmZyUxkG9XFHo9yq_zssFbBFNmKDwPSbUiH39nXTRwodv2loCX_M4f0QAkB2DFsCTZJOLIoVzAYgomIocag9Z4Sy_mIRGVJ510Gi_uer3fduPX1v7WXlju56rYTyLWRmqtjMY8ktMGRmFP_HfNL0Z5ogOTRuZQWda24uJRPpUTM-rmEPArTQAdzILjEuP9S8HgpHBQucVL3eYYge1_W5AqiaqArTMuigKkzFvmsfjoS_nqgvTh5pk5fGQ4J-KBW3GsOOB1RmRQArLg%3D%3D)

clean_body: robocall scammers MUST be held accountable | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | Senator Klobuchar is RIGHT. So we’re launching a brand new petition to support her bill and STOP robocall scammers once and for all. | [We need [33] more signatures from Pennsylvania or we won’t be on track to hit our goal!]() Robocall scammers must be held accountable: \-- They people unwanted messages day after day, week after week \-- They your area code to trick you into answering your phone \-- They sensitive credit card and Social Security information \-- And they on elderly and vulnerable people! These vicious scammers target more than 300 million people EVERY SINGLE DAY! Amy Klobuchar and our Democrats in Congress have the power to STOP robocalls in their tracks, but we need your help. Let's get it done, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Michael Whatley (NCGOP)
subject: It was the honor of a lifetime.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
I’m proud to be a Trump Supporter, Peter.
| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, It was the honor of my lifetime to nominate President Donald J. Trump for Four More Years at the RNC Convention last year. In fact, every time I’ve had the opportunity to stand with President Trump or join him on the campaign trail has been a thrill. Nobody fights harder for America than he does. That’s why I’m so excited to be welcoming him back to North Carolina next month for our State GOP Convention. And when I see him, I want to be able to tell him about all of the Grassroots Republicans who have stepped up to join him in his fight. **[I’m going to be handing him a list of Official Trump Republicans, Peter, and I want your name to be on it. CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT to show that you Stand With Trump today.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw92f2Ca1sL5Au2dX_hEE6iUIOlB3wdgKKDPaI1TsBqvkQy9jfdv38QKA9-f1Ey08WRH55HFC_v-od2RwTaYTMWdqqspZIXdMuvzQ4fOOr6yGfNz31gnoMHnIokFPRPL6dSDmZHZBu0e4AYiL43IbzXzN8vWoA_cftjfw3EReCzmsxPA0V7RIp1Fm_dxowPpL3G_VfH71pfpJ5sHlv8uWDQXSSWljNvDbRNxC0HdR3uSJcDlZP_bHrTMlJFp1QkwIQDOtQzoscbjCPdgeXzs4UmEA&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=270307881237469873_p&n=1)** | | [Stand With Trump](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw92f2Ca1sL5Au2dX_hEE6iUIOlB3wdgKKDPaI1TsBqvkTfKoxN6amppq5i5lQZTjJgUXDDE_Tjtjz_aOrvkJzP5P0wx8O1UdYOF3dfs7N6NBvaOI06qzW5jnlIRJ5TyHKtbVbNEAK3-dreS45NtXsPSEuVDlCgM64RuGTR7o4VJp-0MerB7aDHjsAMKHX8WA9aeYgCrevJfXujmmQVyc_u5eYEkEegwteR52N2WVQ_JxTfBA6GyLDg0iBiC7lqWrZgfeTW1jT7ZntMCij_p7vU6lXHySCDZCu9tfSVKvGXJrs&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=270307881237469873_p&n=2)

I’ve missed having President Trump out on the campaign trail, and I’m so happy to say that **HE’S BACK** \-- and kicking things off with a visit to the great state of North Carolina.
Remember: North Carolina is a **TRUMP** State. Nobody worked harder to win the 2020 campaign than North Carolina Republicans, and thanks to your hard work we delivered for our president.
**[But I know that when I see him, he’s going to ask me for an update. I want to be able to tell him that you’re STILL standing by his side. CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT to get on the Official List of Trump Republicans before he steps off stage.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw92f2Ca1sL5Au2dX_hEE6iUIOlB3wdgKKDPaI1TsBqvkQy9jfdv38QKA9-f1Ey08WRH55HFC_v-od2RwTaYTMWdqqspZIXdMuvzQ4fOOr6yGfNz31gnoMHnIokFPRPL6dSDmZHZBu0e4AYiL43IbzXzN8vWoA_cftjfw3EReCzmsxPA0V7RIp1Fm_dxowPpL3G_VfH71pfpJ5sHlv8uWDQXSSWljNvDbRNxC0HdR3uSJcDlZP_bHrTMlJFp1QkwIQDOtQzoscbjCPdgeXzs4UmEA&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=270307881237469873_p&n=3)**

clean_body: I’m proud to be a Trump Supporter, Peter. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, It was the honor of my lifetime to nominate President Donald J. Trump for Four More Years at the RNC Convention last year. In fact, every time I’ve had the opportunity to stand with President Trump or join him on the campaign trail has been a thrill. Nobody fights harder for America than he does. That’s why I’m so excited to be welcoming him back to North Carolina next month for our State GOP Convention. And when I see him, I want to be able to tell him about all of the Grassroots Republicans who have stepped up to join him in his fight. | | I’ve missed having President Trump out on the campaign trail, and I’m so happy to say that HE’S BACK \-- and kicking things off with a visit to the great state of North Carolina. Remember: North Carolina is a TRUMP State. Nobody worked harder to win the 2020 campaign than North Carolina Republicans, and thanks to your hard work we delivered for our president. | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

body:

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: I stood up to the mob
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last year we were charged When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a028095db3c343179ee6c17837c9d60f&_e=q9IMzPenJEn3v8Zd_Q2iDn89BMg9wujH5zNTjVroSQhu1oPFLRxKUfEVAZg3QGHBeU1DjMVp1v_ZsfTMl8YscNBi_RSz5nWF5-8XeEwN_zItiR2-tmCnRr4FlT_urhcJGJvGO_dCYUyE1t-Jb9P5BSb0nBAZnu8P6k6561mthPadbQjUoRwjwDF3xqNl796VpN9wysMTtvJbVziuCIxoGGR9rvagcYAiu2IikGMp1ITp6KNQTjPIjirhnhSGrUEpBOTazR0aImwllscsAiPlgAtZ9bqi0WD4Rbgu3YiFgEg7x1zzzg4FIsVIvSXnlSuEEurEI62QjUrh_mWK2crBYcw0I8FdqgzVTXP4tCCTZtWyn13k5V2g9HLRPfYIb5GPLWBK7SUjnr3c5VqZZdJqwfYQKcDS3B-4Efmg-PErp-TICXPZU36j6QAVcpqL1rdFh9emYq-jR5zKBceWwTUBzjeVby6pk_YAd0wAJbKNjRc%3D)
---

Peter,

During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past.

When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath.

**My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground._And the scariest part of all?_ What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today.**

**That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a028095db3c343179ee6c17837c9d60f&_e=q9IMzPenJEn3v8Zd_Q2iDn89BMg9wujH5zNTjVroSQhu1oPFLRxKUfEVAZg3QGHBeU1DjMVp1v_ZsfTMl8YscNBi_RSz5nWF5-8XeEwN_zItiR2-tmCnRr4FlT_urhcJGJvGO_dCYUyE1t-Jb9P5BSb0nBAZnu8P6k6561mthPadbQjUoRwjwDF3xqNl796VpN9wysMTtvJbVziuCIxoGGR9rvagcYAiu2IikGMp1ITp6KNQTjPIjirhnhSGrUEpBOTazR0aImwllscsAiPlgCbYZqJ4d9vkc-ZY9I3i56GRiYFIwtJNo687MiAsLWDpy1JINzrNJVlgraYUkV0q6Vvu9-_70if7Uv4pV35TU4gbh1oiKivzy5_Qg3H_uFBFd8fyNVlCSajaWzntuoxgYmWSEZ69HeNElEw5o-DypB5z4MJmF8sd19HUDSST5alDihzt_DtvHWZf5qtcscin9woMLOFiCbaUM_lPjUwEiIs%3D)
[ WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO »](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a028095db3c343179ee6c17837c9d60f&_e=q9IMzPenJEn3v8Zd_Q2iDn89BMg9wujH5zNTjVroSQhu1oPFLRxKUfEVAZg3QGHBeU1DjMVp1v_ZsfTMl8YscNBi_RSz5nWF5-8XeEwN_zItiR2-tmCnRr4FlT_urhcJGJvGO_dCYUyE1t-Jb9P5BSb0nBAZnu8P6k6561mthPadbQjUoRwjwDF3xqNl796VpN9wysMTtvJbVziuCIxoGGR9rvagcYAiu2IikGMp1ITp6KNQTjPIjirhnhSGrUEpBOTazR0aImwllscsAiPlgJjgqrwJOyauxrFDX7x3a5PRbZ46U5hTuvVOeIDqfc9411T0r468mWAvd_iaTRT1deW4RCkfwxsPVj9C1YIucbL4tOCE362ruU1YFvaPiLgeEuWZiNRuFmvBAvWaZwUBJak2GQQeoZf3fgKQlqaU3eqI2Uaj7F8bkq-5Qjwfn-PwSzUphQ4TZhe1peUkULcmyvImEyCp4R1fnB8OYuT_FBs%3D)
Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last year**we were charged with unlawful use of a weapon.**

**Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around.**

**I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms.**

I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us.

**I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life.**

**[Will you consider a contribution of $5, $10, $25, $100 or more today to help me ensure every conservative in America sees my Senate announcement video?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a028095db3c343179ee6c17837c9d60f&_e=q9IMzPenJEn3v8Zd_Q2iDn89BMg9wujH5zNTjVroSQhu1oPFLRxKUfEVAZg3QGHBeU1DjMVp1v_ZsfTMl8YscNBi_RSz5nWF5-8XeEwN_zItiR2-tmCnRr4FlT_urhcJGJvGO_dCYUyE1t-Jb9P5BSb0nBAZnu8P6k6561mthPadbQjUoRwjwDF3xqNl796VpN9wysMTtvJbVziuCIxoGGR9rvagcYAiu2IikGMp1ITp6KNQTjPIjirhnhSGrUEpBOTazR0aImwllscsAiPlgMy0sboXaRWbHsXygtqfjJyCqF8pprZxzBy0CehQCjbiQRYobaSvha__BV4EFpIl445WMSj0AA5_zReIW1gxpPglnY6OLZPe8gOW51E0LODRy2KgI63XYg9NfR-kgY-Zv3eCOxN3sxzm-esrRe3oTULoe6kpxm3benQ9Q4j4bwqDfhXDDz-WdtCW6H0FnpeqD6Gd7AWxkRFdfsmxT025jpE%3D)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a028095db3c343179ee6c17837c9d60f&_e=q9IMzPenJEn3v8Zd_Q2iDn89BMg9wujH5zNTjVroSQhu1oPFLRxKUfEVAZg3QGHBeU1DjMVp1v_ZsfTMl8YscNBi_RSz5nWF5-8XeEwN_zItiR2-tmCnRr4FlT_urhcJGJvGO_dCYUyE1t-Jb9P5BSb0nBAZnu8P6k6561mthPadbQjUoRwjwDF3xqNl796VpN9wysMTtvJbVziuCIxoGGR9rvagcYAiu2IikGMp1ITp6KNQTjPIjirhnhSGrUEpBOTazR0aImwllscsAiPlgPd7Bcm70zM2lUHTkJ9AZ5sUf0YRGIDGxCI8MtJDWTbXZPPmogXzl7DftVbbt0UYU6OP9wWwip2iYoj9DJXt37t-dFJZu7vnxV6NHeS11tRXd2ALjW_omapa9vq4ZKPEpd9VZIsqkmX4ZlcHVdYzvypxkibh3I0JJ-pOAD3HDugxj-4KqJUY-isd1S1F4xOxla52L0zCq7AKddStQ90wJaA%3D)
[ WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO »](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a028095db3c343179ee6c17837c9d60f&_e=q9IMzPenJEn3v8Zd_Q2iDn89BMg9wujH5zNTjVroSQhu1oPFLRxKUfEVAZg3QGHBeU1DjMVp1v_ZsfTMl8YscNBi_RSz5nWF5-8XeEwN_zItiR2-tmCnRr4FlT_urhcJGJvGO_dCYUyE1t-Jb9P5BSb0nBAZnu8P6k6561mthPadbQjUoRwjwDF3xqNl796VpN9wysMTtvJbVziuCIxoGGR9rvagcYAiu2IikGMp1ITp6KNQTjPIjirhnhSGrUEpBOTazR0aImwllscsAiPlgI9IbaKY8lJEHeGrcEAm89BZq5TnwODaT0EZvfdgShm_HudQpQSNPdW_yxpEGGbMS6twkBZfQrgSfMLVQoglEq_ltq2LiRdybKYl1YW-DMJoMSg_2dUhxYKqjdMCu7DvqaxJcf7-PJBGgrJvnOBAOMo3LXkF2CjOxVzUlf9hmkXEEvPmxt8EpEjmaubOVcU9QmOHEaZlbIEZvsN6YFCKZNQ%3D)
**Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home.**

When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground.

When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back.

** I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now**.

Now,**[I’m asking for the honor of standing up and fighting for every American against the far-Left’s all-out-assault on our democratic freedoms](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a028095db3c343179ee6c17837c9d60f&_e=q9IMzPenJEn3v8Zd_Q2iDn89BMg9wujH5zNTjVroSQhu1oPFLRxKUfEVAZg3QGHBeU1DjMVp1v_ZsfTMl8YscNBi_RSz5nWF5-8XeEwN_zItiR2-tmCnRr4FlT_urhcJGJvGO_dCYUyE1t-Jb9P5BSb0nBAZnu8P6k6561mthPadbQjUoRwjwDF3xqNl796VpN9wysMTtvJbVziuCIxoGGR9rvagcYAiu2IikGMp1ITp6KNQTjPIjirhnhSGrUEpBOTazR0aImwllscsAiPlgMGcNv0RXNjZ9io7j4tZely2Ro_1aSaWkLJzvhp4_Krg0bedsOASr8MGYG2m0t_tsoY12GFavCoQ8ExXxsNYk_Wk6-7cJdxPHu4V_K1W5CJMGyt2YM0WgHN4czb67bshpJKItINw5fjgzYFWgrTmI9mHjK5d_hj6FdJE2_OdmL3EOrK59COOjsIhvDTG7RExjQFyBXflcD2UY-gOIw81Ico%3D)**.

**Here is my ask of you today:** Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, **[will you chip-in whatever you can afford today to help me start my campaign for the Senate on the strongest note possible?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a028095db3c343179ee6c17837c9d60f&_e=q9IMzPenJEn3v8Zd_Q2iDn89BMg9wujH5zNTjVroSQhu1oPFLRxKUfEVAZg3QGHBeU1DjMVp1v_ZsfTMl8YscNBi_RSz5nWF5-8XeEwN_zItiR2-tmCnRr4FlT_urhcJGJvGO_dCYUyE1t-Jb9P5BSb0nBAZnu8P6k6561mthPadbQjUoRwjwDF3xqNl796VpN9wysMTtvJbVziuCIxoGGR9rvagcYAiu2IikGMp1ITp6KNQTjPIjirhnhSGrUEpBOTazR0aImwllscsAiPlgDtT1mqxnaV5VFSAIuONwMkCsk9aLFUVquw-dffqkqIAUzFNlWYxw7R4-0H8zjQI_1G9tJ23PoZlDkIeMngjOqpQs7CFFAHBHSFT68FTyd12v7UimPRSJtySeWVPsU5aFHfanIEsFnbvGlMtp49XRtptW22fkg7tjfs81-xVT2QTnk4k6GJaX7gzA0bC0mI5xrUC0FcbcC6IXrBE883FskU%3D)**

clean_body: Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last year we were charged When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Peter, During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past. When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath. My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground.And the scariest part of all? What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today. That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate. Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last yearwe were charged with unlawful use of a weapon. Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around. I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms. I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us. I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life. Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home. When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground. When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back. I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now. Now,. Here is my ask of you today: Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, Peter, you can count on me to protect and defend our Constitutional liberties. You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you. And I will always defend our police. . For America, Mark McCloskey | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. body:
there’s a big problem in politics right now. It’s a bunch of so-called “leaders” who refuse to listen to the people they represent! [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=3b5a839cafa741b9b874e4c76d8c5071&_e=enNPKF6TqrI_8YLDwP6qm9RlxzDJGXBXxwrMlM1X-a0-rIabL26DIckUTHAZ8yodtvI-ev2ByTVV7rx68yq1MAIJ6UtjKtHDbXlvvQQubBgHs5S4o7rVpwJQk_OZgvbCEJJ_t1voySD9IMUuWpVEhPur5GhhhGOpAcqojFAm8WUZ0MzNVlwY-bzyPl_RhuJ7MSB0Sbq3qZGoYfH4BkJXV_hBT7KhMj2Yd-BqOOPEekvhMNHpskFfD-ncgk-OpHYzJVRe1WshH_2qwVokYPOwDL_9qWB7RKn5N70xJY7NUEBfvEB3BX8I2v92xjvbr5T9VqKfyc0JpNzbWRkmP2QyqQW6YAZLz1h9l858evlbR8tRJsuvM11TtLZm7U9UWPF4NMGntREztXp-lNsbk0Hw9R5UCa_ez5u8i2ZjYRartzLB4TsOkQ4UpoYnQkCW2LIMmQhv818UrQy99O_BBgZSgCon6hMJx2JDvYEjUJFmvJk%3D) Peter - there’s a big problem in politics right now.
It’s a bunch of so-called “leaders” who refuse to listen to the people they represent! _That’s never Sarah. _ She cares about what you’re thinking and she will ALWAYS defend your voice.
That’s why we are checking in now to hear about the issues that matter most to you. [**_Will you take just 10 seconds to fill out our issue survey?_**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=3b5a839cafa741b9b874e4c76d8c5071&_e=enNPKF6TqrI_8YLDwP6qm9RlxzDJGXBXxwrMlM1X-a0-rIabL26DIckUTHAZ8yodtvI-ev2ByTVV7rx68yq1MAIJ6UtjKtHDbXlvvQQubBgHs5S4o7rVpwJQk_OZgvbCEJJ_t1voySD9IMUuWpVEhPur5GhhhGOpAcqojFAm8WUZ0MzNVlwY-bzyPl_RhuJ7MSB0Sbq3qZGoYfH4BkJXV_hBT7KhMj2Yd-BqOOPEekvhMNHpskFfD-ncgk-OpHYzJVRe1WshH_2qwVokYPOwDJ_5x9njMubz0zUjb246xdSOcdnqNN21UWiRnqkFzwZJDgElz87rS_7lXYeGDSAOGDLQY58zDLt-goxG8YAwy03t9e9oYQFjvFPnhCyii4hWEW3L8yDbfBRJIBYgvkerTI4KuZBADrvJcJlhvbkmVCcBtSHXfM4FH96oYsGq_OanxA8ew6zRTTqjZA4GouKqcrxSU_RhDStAD8l-WNkHReY%3D) [**WEIGH IN NOW**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=3b5a839cafa741b9b874e4c76d8c5071&_e=enNPKF6TqrI_8YLDwP6qm9RlxzDJGXBXxwrMlM1X-a0-rIabL26DIckUTHAZ8yodtvI-ev2ByTVV7rx68yq1MAIJ6UtjKtHDbXlvvQQubBgHs5S4o7rVpwJQk_OZgvbCEJJ_t1voySD9IMUuWpVEhPur5GhhhGOpAcqojFAm8WUZ0MzNVlwY-bzyPl_RhuJ7MSB0Sbq3qZGoYfH4BkJXV_hBT7KhMj2Yd-BqOOPEekvhMNHpskFfD-ncgk-OpHYzJVRe1WshH_2qwVokYPOwDBWWDX7eVx6QSjXmGv_zAckznd5TmNnwhDe6MZvYog56F2Cgb9cN-_X1OLfDEXg2Yudvx7wE4sfsw7cxERNc39l_dLYiDQKd7KapsLsndYs-tIavKyiNAFdZd56cGBZ2UXGDNe9d17pepdxdbRI_Y_c4Bvs9VNWH05ryewB9xZmr0Jezo09UfHgllpc0gElbv5axb_QLcH_jI1zOJmWoHPw%3D) Sarah believes strongly that our country needs leaders with the courage to do what’s right – not what’s politically correct or convenient. _Sarah will always: _
* _Defend your right to be free of socialism and tyranny._
* _Preserve your Second Amendment right to keep your family safe. _
* _Protect your freedom of speech and religious liberty_.

**_She has been tested under fire, successfully managing one crisis after another_** **_in one of the most difficult, high-pressure jobs in all of government._** You always know where Sarah stands. Now, we just need you to tell us what you think! Can you take our survey and let us know how you feel about some of the biggest issues facing our country? [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=3b5a839cafa741b9b874e4c76d8c5071&_e=enNPKF6TqrI_8YLDwP6qm9RlxzDJGXBXxwrMlM1X-a0-rIabL26DIckUTHAZ8yodtvI-ev2ByTVV7rx68yq1MAIJ6UtjKtHDbXlvvQQubBgHs5S4o7rVpwJQk_OZgvbCEJJ_t1voySD9IMUuWpVEhPur5GhhhGOpAcqojFAm8WUZ0MzNVlwY-bzyPl_RhuJ7MSB0Sbq3qZGoYfH4BkJXV_hBT7KhMj2Yd-BqOOPEekvhMNHpskFfD-ncgk-OpHYzJVRe1WshH_2qwVokYPOwDL8zbkmaev3WQ4vD_KVHftZ4Iy9wqcFokfpVYPP9b_ooeTjSXJXBzkeq1bm_PwVODh2dc316Fth4a_1z-eKAoBwuQlPFHK_gExipjcfFVviu9WpUTa2nKcb-pK6WL6ugM5HdrQK4DVrlGwKtjOVnBA2VgM4DghfojfQE0RZ7msfcErI6KVBMqHchMLl2s4ws0O9eAEA0a4TVa_D_gkDhjVA%3D) Sarah and our campaign team will be reviewing the results, and we look forward to seeing what you say. Thank you, Team Sarah |

body:
When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that the freedoms we take for granted are worth ... When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7b96ce3a23374a6798107685e76d01dd&_e=fKm77xCwgUMRPVUIeU8Mr4oQ9gpfjTj9xt7mNbnow0KCVVcVydE8p78I64-DF-hkRtVVLAGBI6GUpEVeQzcgjaxKCbP8TM_uIjQwovpH7kInJ68TtxXAs7lAJktc9zPNyq_5KAre0yq8Ay022cISsqp0QKolXQTMks3DwztIoFUUbXXaqQDzYvi4DmjOnS9ggos3Ju9UBqMqo1USf-k9f-j1Zd0WG5u6sMwdPqfg2OSgW6HF1eKBLTZxKmbaIREsZyOhrL7U_EewXSm7juSu4LDRy6YnsUBvLV1RtZ24IL0-X-7CyIweef_qCKYOGa-qtVWLhd6ckl6dp1-DAWIxCLOPGOsGM3xqiGCl7IUKkPnFkU-QbVeGbFWh_fLOz551_7oQySo0yk8AyBdI_UIaIgLjaQ3mp_Wxc7bd7ODAarFdWqw2eMfM8LuE25bpKeX5ujMDSYitE5RZmXE0tIOYP-fhlH4kR5Zf405iefXUAEArf8seo7gyp7pvRFZwjE9y_T5tBGuhKcxBumf70GQ5zmJ_67mehAKPrL7_pECvcT2SBNGyOw_Pf1vak0p9ppfMfoCUCO5U5_K3_NIAB1VXonwK1PKfMspR052mxSGOK7fZRrmCHmx9gT5PlAWfZJ-zOD-dlDNVIJobyr-2uYUkWQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past.

When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath.

**My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground. And the scariest part of _all?_ What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today.**

**That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate.**

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7b96ce3a23374a6798107685e76d01dd&_e=fKm77xCwgUMRPVUIeU8Mr4oQ9gpfjTj9xt7mNbnow0KCVVcVydE8p78I64-DF-hkRtVVLAGBI6GUpEVeQzcgjaxKCbP8TM_uIjQwovpH7kInJ68TtxXAs7lAJktc9zPNyq_5KAre0yq8Ay022cISsqp0QKolXQTMks3DwztIoFUUbXXaqQDzYvi4DmjOnS9ggos3Ju9UBqMqo1USf-k9f-j1Zd0WG5u6sMwdPqfg2OSgW6HF1eKBLTZxKmbaIREsZyOhrL7U_EewXSm7juSu4LDRy6YnsUBvLV1RtZ24IL0-X-7CyIweef_qCKYOGa-qtVWLhd6ckl6dp1-DAWIxCLOPGOsGM3xqiGCl7IUKkPnFkU-QbVeGbFWh_fLOz551_7oQySo0yk8AyBdI_UIaIgLjaQ3mp_Wxc7bd7ODAarFdWqw2eMfM8LuE25bpKeX5Preq5elqWBKhR-Fl697uCYXKfKUtOjBoH6-KPBG2zKAbigdqRA-I-nmvigaQkQQNxC4NbS8DNCUnTtkrCH1Fz7FXMnVBZoZvluNl0AqBnasEKpi3QK7Bw0NdK5y8v053peelpg3gFY0nchBfDmUTec-27l0_V1Th8cd6pYmWvLH65GcWGwmRR8b6zqetr1ZhcRBbDLYOO5-RcPUMU_AHTA%3D%3D)

Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last year**we were charged with unlawful use of a weapon.**

**Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around.**

**I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms.**

I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us.

**I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life.**

**[Will you stand with me against the MOB by joining my team today? Please watch my announcement video and add your name to my McCloskey for Senate campaign team.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7b96ce3a23374a6798107685e76d01dd&_e=fKm77xCwgUMRPVUIeU8Mr4oQ9gpfjTj9xt7mNbnow0KCVVcVydE8p78I64-DF-hkRtVVLAGBI6GUpEVeQzcgjaxKCbP8TM_uIjQwovpH7kInJ68TtxXAs7lAJktc9zPNyq_5KAre0yq8Ay022cISsqp0QKolXQTMks3DwztIoFUUbXXaqQDzYvi4DmjOnS9ggos3Ju9UBqMqo1USf-k9f-j1Zd0WG5u6sMwdPqfg2OSgW6HF1eKBLTZxKmbaIREsZyOhrL7U_EewXSm7juSu4LDRy6YnsUBvLV1RtZ24IL0-X-7CyIweef_qCKYOGa-qtVWLhd6ckl6dp1-DAWIxCLOPGOsGM3xqiGCl7IUKkPnFkU-QbVeGbFWh_fLOz551_7oQySo0yk8AyBdI_UIaIgLjaQ3mp_Wxc7bd7ODAarFdWqw2eMfM8LuE25bpKeX5O9hMok91hb5VUi8CPUIPE_B1SEC7JrgWoc0lzBu8YG8E7kkcMGAhLb9G_J9atPFK6HRDmMpvQimGz_RbRLMpiqwY4CoBjSGnXOaEusspG82TbzEqaIkF8KWlILhmUJtQkHHz0lbDa-vhvAnlSQhmaqlwUHpy83mAGcVVxTIixgCIZF8PS7T7VtATSAseQVO3Hl2IxCOXqeHji9yKmseehg%3D%3D)**

**Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home.**

When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground.

When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back.

** I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now**.

Now,**[I’m asking for the honor of standing up and fighting for every American against the far-Left’s all-out-assault on our democratic freedoms](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7b96ce3a23374a6798107685e76d01dd&_e=fKm77xCwgUMRPVUIeU8Mr4oQ9gpfjTj9xt7mNbnow0KCVVcVydE8p78I64-DF-hkRtVVLAGBI6GUpEVeQzcgjaxKCbP8TM_uIjQwovpH7kInJ68TtxXAs7lAJktc9zPNyq_5KAre0yq8Ay022cISsqp0QKolXQTMks3DwztIoFUUbXXaqQDzYvi4DmjOnS9ggos3Ju9UBqMqo1USf-k9f-j1Zd0WG5u6sMwdPqfg2OSgW6HF1eKBLTZxKmbaIREsZyOhrL7U_EewXSm7juSu4LDRy6YnsUBvLV1RtZ24IL0-X-7CyIweef_qCKYOGa-qtVWLhd6ckl6dp1-DAWIxCLOPGOsGM3xqiGCl7IUKkPnFkU-QbVeGbFWh_fLOz551_7oQySo0yk8AyBdI_UIaIgLjaQ3mp_Wxc7bd7ODAarFdWqw2eMfM8LuE25bpKeX5g30uPnEiTa-uKIfBKza62TF8cW_ixK1YTBDYBqY3uWAYRW5OdFPoPgpP7P3VGdigZwuTbQDoS1sh713BgNtRVYDFAuHQHJJC448n0qQxEYi5EbE4y3Q1GAiv8QhH-sB0nT_k6OLaYro8Sf4DoiKFjmggFGJH4Dv1I7ClNAEljJ2BO4RK-8MmmYiObSI3GdTIUH7-EDAhfikS436jXeld9w%3D%3D)**.

**Here is my ask of you today:** Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, **[will you add your name to a list of supporters who have pledged to stand with me and my wife against the mobs of the far Left?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7b96ce3a23374a6798107685e76d01dd&_e=fKm77xCwgUMRPVUIeU8Mr4oQ9gpfjTj9xt7mNbnow0KCVVcVydE8p78I64-DF-hkRtVVLAGBI6GUpEVeQzcgjaxKCbP8TM_uIjQwovpH7kInJ68TtxXAs7lAJktc9zPNyq_5KAre0yq8Ay022cISsqp0QKolXQTMks3DwztIoFUUbXXaqQDzYvi4DmjOnS9ggos3Ju9UBqMqo1USf-k9f-j1Zd0WG5u6sMwdPqfg2OSgW6HF1eKBLTZxKmbaIREsZyOhrL7U_EewXSm7juSu4LDRy6YnsUBvLV1RtZ24IL0-X-7CyIweef_qCKYOGa-qtVWLhd6ckl6dp1-DAWIxCLOPGOsGM3xqiGCl7IUKkPnFkU-QbVeGbFWh_fLOz551_7oQySo0yk8AyBdI_UIaIgLjaQ3mp_Wxc7bd7ODAarFdWqw2eMfM8LuE25bpKeX5wTFGrVGzArnW4J2poZgGV9cLViJCMj-tMK2-V1Rk0sAZmwNXUM4LL8E6nxHAN2pUf-R7zsPgxMqOq55V3iWy4pkE2uv04fdxIDGevcR5XmtmENSZ3nM-HRv5bdW4Ck9DDgr51_z-mj4pNqtrAGRn7jHrUYSkrdc8qd4z37TAkBul45CszegtMLy5kR6I4CIfkJnmjjoKFwkRg1SH00Wkew%3D%3D)**

clean_body: When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that the freedoms we take for granted are worth ... When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Peter, During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past. When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath. My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground. And the scariest part of all? What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today. That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate. Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last yearwe were charged with unlawful use of a weapon. Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around. I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms. I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us. I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life. Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home. When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground. When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back. I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now. Now,. Here is my ask of you today: Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, Peter, you can count on me to protect and defend our Constitutional liberties. You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you. And I will always defend our police. For America, Mark McCloskey | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

body:

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Fla. County Gives Illegal Immigrants Special IDs to Get Vaccines, Public Services
body:
Florida’s second-most populous county is the state’s first to offer illegal immigrants identification cards so they can obtain taxpayer-funded services, including COVID-19 vaccines.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | May 19, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55730&L=24955&F=H&)
---
# [Fla. County Gives Illegal Immigrants Special IDs to Get Vaccines, Public Services](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55730&L=24955&F=H&)
Florida’s second-most populous county is the state’s first to offer illegal immigrants identification cards so they can obtain taxpayer-funded services, including COVID-19 vaccines. Elected officials in Broward County, situated in southeast Florida with a population of about two million, unanimously passed the measure with ardent support from the county’s top law enforcement officer, Sheriff Gregory Tony. Republican Governor Ron DeSantis appointed Tony to the elected position after suspending former Broward Sheriff Scott Israel for mishandling the 2018 shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55730&L=24955&F=H&)
|
---
| |
---
### [Judicial Watch: Montgomery County Public Schools Spent $454,000 on ‘Anti-racist System Audit’ ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55730&L=24956&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY3J0LXNjaG9vbHMtNDU0ay8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxOTIwNDYzNw==) Judicial Watch The documents, obtained under the Maryland Public Information Act, reveal that students of “Maryland’s Largest School District” who attended Thomas Pyle Middle School’s social justice class were taught that the phrase “Make America Great Again” was an example of “covert white supremacy” that is “socially unacceptable.” The phrase is ranked on a pyramid just below, “lynching,” “hate crimes,” “the N-word” and “racial slurs.” They were also taught that “white privilege” means being favored by school authorities and having a positive relationship with the police. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55730&L=24956&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY3J0LXNjaG9vbHMtNDU0ay8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxOTIwNDYzNw==)
---
### [How The Biden Border Crisis Hurts Children ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55730&L=24957&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2JpZGVuLWJvcmRlci1jaGlsZHJlbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxOTIwNDYzNw==) Judicial Watch Biden’s border crisis “victimizes everyone involved,” including unaccompanied minors, Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton noted Friday. As Fitton further explained, the administration’s failure to enforce the security at our border hasn’t only hurt our national sovereignty, and by extension, the rights of millions of Americans; it has contributed to what might appear to be a true humanitarian crisis involving the lives of thousands of unaccompanied, often smuggled children. In response to three recent reports of child abuse and neglect at the Freeman Coliseum in Texas, Judicial Watch has sued the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for records about the abuse of children at U.S. border facilities. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55730&L=24957&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2JpZGVuLWJvcmRlci1jaGlsZHJlbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxOTIwNDYzNw==)
---

clean_body: Florida’s second-most populous county is the state’s first to offer illegal immigrants identification cards so they can obtain taxpayer-funded services, including COVID-19 vaccines. | | | Because no one is above the law! | May 19, 2021 ---|---|--- | | = = Florida’s second-most populous county is the state’s first to offer illegal immigrants identification cards so they can obtain taxpayer-funded services, including COVID-19 vaccines. Elected officials in Broward County, situated in southeast Florida with a population of about two million, unanimously passed the measure with ardent support from the county’s top law enforcement officer, Sheriff Gregory Tony. Republican Governor Ron DeSantis appointed Tony to the elected position after suspending former Broward Sheriff Scott Israel for mishandling the 2018 shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland. = | | | == Judicial Watch The documents, obtained under the Maryland Public Information Act, reveal that students of “Maryland’s Largest School District” who attended Thomas Pyle Middle School’s social justice class were taught that the phrase “Make America Great Again” was an example of “covert white supremacy” that is “socially unacceptable.” The phrase is ranked on a pyramid just below, “lynching,” “hate crimes,” “the N-word” and “racial slurs.” They were also taught that “white privilege” means being favored by school authorities and having a positive relationship with the police. == == Judicial Watch Biden’s border crisis “victimizes everyone involved,” including unaccompanied minors, Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton noted Friday. As Fitton further explained, the administration’s failure to enforce the security at our border hasn’t only hurt our national sovereignty, and by extension, the rights of millions of Americans; it has contributed to what might appear to be a true humanitarian crisis involving the lives of thousands of unaccompanied, often smuggled children. In response to three recent reports of child abuse and neglect at the Freeman Coliseum in Texas, Judicial Watch has sued the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for records about the abuse of children at U.S. border facilities. == Judicial Watch With weeks to go to elections that will decide New York City’s next mayor and the powerful post of Manhattan district attorney, rising crime suddenly is at the center of the political action. The stakes are high—and not just for New York. | CLIPS = | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

subject: BULL$H!#
body:
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=9ed3c6c842&e=56fbdb3cc4)
---
| | | Peter -

Americans can’t get gas. Illegal immigrants are being released into our communities at record numbers. Russians are hacking our critical infrastructure. Violent crime is skyrocketing in our cities. Inflation is rampant while people aren’t going back to work.

**This is Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi’s America.**

Nancy and Joe have controlled the federal government for all of five months and they’ve created unprecedented crisis after unprecedented crisis for American families.

But what does the liberal media want us focused on? Bull$h!# DC drama. Just look at my recent interview with Chuck Todd on Meet the Press.
---
| [ ](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=9cf7ebb175&e=56fbdb3cc4)
---
| [**CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH**](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=58b9688edf&e=56fbdb3cc4)
I explained to Chuck that Americans - my constituents - couldn’t care less about the BS political drama he focused on throughout the majority of his show.

They care about rising gas prices. They care about getting their kids back to school. They care about rising unemployment. They care about a secure country.

But the press won’t cover this. They want to ignore it because they want to protect Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi.

That’s why I need your help. If the press won’t tell the truth about Nancy and Joe’s agenda to the American people, I will.

I’m going to cut around the press and communicate directly with Americans on social media, in advertisements, anyway I can. But I need the resources to keep this message operation going.

We can’t let the socialist left get away with what they’re doing to our country, and we can’t count on the liberal media to tell the truth or focus on the issues that affect you.

But I’m committed to the truth. I’m committed to fighting back. I’m committed to firing Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden and make sure Democrats don’t have control of our country in 2022, 2024, and beyond. I’m committed to preserving the future of America.

[**Are you with me?**](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=efdaab4cbd&e=56fbdb3cc4)
---
| [Contribute Now](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=7e7787dbdb&e=56fbdb3cc4 "Contribute Now")
---
| In Service,

Dan Crenshaw
---

Peter,

I’ve grilled Mark Zuckerberg in committee hearings, called out the hypocrisy of Amazon and the dangerous censorship efforts by Twitter.

Desperate to defend their monopoly, Facebook has pumped vast amounts of money, earned from selling your personal data, into groups with patriotic names like **American Edge— DON’T BE FOOLED!!**_ _
This group’s only mission is to further Facebook’s goals. This week, Facebook launched ads against me, run conveniently on Facebook—**you just can’t make this stuff up! **

clean_body: Facebook is scared of scrutiny, and the left is scared of losing Silicon Valley’s censorship of conservatives. | | Peter, I’ve been sounding the big-tech alarm for years now, and Silicon Valley has taken notice. I’ve grilled Mark Zuckerberg in committee hearings, called out the hypocrisy of Amazon and the dangerous censorship efforts by Twitter. Desperate to defend their monopoly, Facebook has pumped vast amounts of money, earned from selling your personal data, into groups with patriotic names like American Edge— DON’T BE FOOLED!! This group’s only mission is to further Facebook’s goals. This week, Facebook launched ads against me, run conveniently on Facebook—you just can’t make this stuff up! Facebook is scared of scrutiny, and the left is scared of losing Silicon Valley’s censorship of conservatives. We're in this together, Josh Hawley P.S. If you want to join our team and be part of this movement, sign-up and donate to our campaign. Every dollar helps us fight the big tech, big-corporation, elitist establishment who are hell-bent on keeping the status quo. | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Team AOC
subject: Palestine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria and her colleagues introduced a resolution that would block the planned $735 million sale of bombs to Israel.
#
In the last ten days, at least 219 Palestinians have been killed, including at least 100 women and children.1 1,500 people have been injured and more than 58,000 displaced.2
At a time when so many, including our President, support a ceasefire, we should not be sending ‘direct attack’ weaponry to Israeli to prolong this violence.
It is long past time to end the U.S. policy of unconditional military arms sales, particularly to governments that have violated human rights.
**That’s why Alexandria and her colleagues Rep. Mark Pocan and Rep. Rashida Tlaib introduced a resolution that would block the planned $735 million sale of bombs to Israel.**
[**In order to pass this resolution and stop the sale of more weapons to Israel, we need you to call your member of Congress and let them know where you stand. Will you make a call today to your representative?**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/stop-weapon-sale/?source=em20210519-2118&t=1&akid=2118%2E2526796%2EPaFtRN)
### **→ Find the number for your rep[here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8970?t=2&akid=2118%2E2526796%2EPaFtRN) ← **
_Don’t be scared. Congress lines exist to receive your calls. Be KIND and clear._
Hi, my name is _____, and I'm calling from _____.
I’m calling on you to support the resolution blocking the planned $735 million sale of bombs to Israel. The United States should not be rubber-stamping weapons sales to the Israeli government as they deploy our resources to target international media outlets, schools, hospitals, humanitarian missions and civilian sites for bombing.
We have a responsibility to protect human rights. Thank you.
**[Tell us how it went](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/stop-weapon-sale/?source=em20210519-2118&t=3&akid=2118%2E2526796%2EPaFtRN)**
We have a responsibility to protect human rights. Tweets and messages of solidarity are not enough. **Traction on this issue is very dependent on all of us taking necessary action right now.**
Please make your voice heard by urging your member of Congress to take a stand and support the resolution to block the upcoming sale of bombs to Israel to protect the human rights of Palestinians. [**Use the link here to find the phone number for your representative today.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8970?t=4&akid=2118%2E2526796%2EPaFtRN)
With a heavy heart,
Team AOC
1 - [BBC](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8968?t=5&akid=2118%2E2526796%2EPaFtRN)
2 - [Al Jazeera](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8969?t=6&akid=2118%2E2526796%2EPaFtRN)

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=2118%2E2526796%2EPaFtRN) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=2118%2E2526796%2EPaFtRN) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=2118%2E2526796%2EPaFtRN)

subject: I want you to imagine this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bartos for US Senate |
body:
What if I told you that could all be a reality in 2022, and it might only... | |
---
_Hey, it’s Jeff Bartos._
